CN121156685A.title: Preparation method of Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube
CN121156685A.abstract: The invention discloses a preparation method of a Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube. The method comprises the following steps: 1, preparing a Ta-W-Hf alloy tube blank by adopting an electric spark perforation process and linear cutting; secondly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy pipe blank is subjected to cold rolling, and a Ta-W-Hf alloy cold-rolled pipe blank is obtained; thirdly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy cold-rolled tube blank is subjected to acid pickling and then subjected to ball spinning, and a Ta-W-Hf alloy thin-walled tube is obtained; and fourthly, the Ta-W-Hf alloy thin-walled tube is subjected to annealing treatment, and the Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube is obtained. According to the method, the tube blank is prepared through electric spark perforation and linear cutting, the thinner thin-walled tube with the large diameter-thickness ratio is prepared in combination with cold rolling, then the inner diameter, the outer diameter and the wall thickness are further reduced through ball spinning, the surface quality is improved, and the Ta-W-Hf alloy precise thin-walled tube which is high in size precision, uniform in wall thickness and free of scratches on the inner surface and the outer surface is obtained. The method is suitable for aerospace field.

CN121161092A.title: Green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy as well as preparation method and application thereof
CN121161092A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of copper alloy materials, in particular to a green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy and a preparation method and application thereof. The invention provides a green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy which comprises the following chemical components in percentage by mass: 4.0-5.0% of titanium, 0.5-0.6% of cobalt and the balance of copper and inevitable impurities. The green beryllium-free explosion-proof alloy is prepared by adopting the processes of vacuum melting, casting molding, homogenizing treatment, single hot rolling, solution treatment and aging treatment, and has the characteristics of high strength (the tensile strength is greater than or equal to 1000MPa), high elongation (greater than or equal to 30% IACS), high conductivity (greater than or equal to 10% IACS), no magnetism (less than or equal to 5Nt/m) and no spark in collision; the requirements of tools in flammable and explosive environments on safety, mechanical performance and static electricity conduction are completely met, and the risk of beryllium pollution is thoroughly eliminated.

CN223685111U.title: Pipe polishing and cleaning all-in-one machine
CN223685111U.abstract: The utility model discloses a pipe fitting polishing and cleaning all-in-one machine which comprises an operation table, three sets of transmission structures are arranged on the top of the operation table from front to back, a polishing structure is arranged above the set of transmission structures located on the front face, and a dust collecting device is arranged above the transmission structures located on the front face. The utility model relates to the technical field of pipe fitting polishing, through the cooperation of the spark baffle, the dust cover and the dust removal fan, the spark baffle is installed on the side face of the polishing position of a pipe fitting, the spark baffle is used for blocking polishing sparks, and the collecting groove of the spark baffle is used for collecting metal filings. And a dust cover is arranged outside the polishing structure to prevent polishing smoke dust from scattering, a dust collection fan is used for collecting the polishing smoke dust in time, and the problem that when an existing pipe fitting polishing device conducts polishing work, sparks and metal smoke dust can be generated during polishing work, and the polishing efficiency is improved is solved. CN223684578U.title: Copper pipe falling device of spark erosion drilling machine
CN223684578U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of machining, and particularly relates to a copper pipe falling device of a spark erosion drilling machine. The device comprises a copper pipe discharging mechanism, a copper pipe pushing mechanism, a water plugging mechanism, a gas conveying mechanism and a copper pipe clamping mechanism. The copper pipe discharging mechanism, the copper pipe pushing mechanism, the water plugging mechanism, the gas conveying mechanism and the copper pipe clamping mechanism are sequentially assembled on the electric spark drilling machine frame from top to bottom, and the copper pipe is conveyed in the vertical direction, so that the copper pipe is accurately conveyed to the copper pipe clamping mechanism. The copper pipe discharging mechanism, the copper pipe pushing mechanism, the water plugging mechanism, the gas conveying mechanism and the copper pipe clamping mechanism are provided with a first falling hole, a second falling hole, a third falling hole, a fourth falling hole and a fifth falling hole which extend in the vertical direction and are coaxially distributed, and copper pipes are conveyed along the first falling hole, the second falling hole, the third falling hole, the fourth falling hole and the fifth falling hole. And the copper pipe conveying accuracy can be improved.

CN223684530U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of pipe cutting machines, and particularly relates to a pipe cutting machine with a safety protection device, which comprises a processing box and a cutting component, a clamping component for clamping pipes is arranged on the processing box, a drain pipe is embedded and communicated in the left front of the bottom of the processing box, and a mounting box is fixedly arranged in the middle of the top end of the processing box. US2025385488A1.title: GAS-FILLED SPARK GAP
US2025385488A1.abstract: A gas-filled spark gap for the protection of an electric installation has an electrically-insulating body, two electrodes fixed to the electrical-insulating body and spaced from one another in a main direction, an inter-electrode space formed in the electrically-insulating body between the two electrodes, two connecting terminals intended to enable electrical connection of the gas-filled spark gap to the electric installation being electrically-connected to a respective one of the two electrodes, an inter-electrode space including a diverter channel defining a propagation trajectory for an electric arc, and a gas trapped in the inter-electrode space, the gas being selected from argon Ar, neon Ne, nitrogen N2, hydrogen H2, helium He and mixtures thereof.

US2025384762A1.abstract: An electrical power line mounted fire warning system and a method of monitoring and providing a fire warning using the same are provided. CN121137397A.title: Tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy and preparation method and application thereof
CN121137397A.abstract: The invention discloses a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy and a preparation method and application thereof, and relates to the technical field of non-ferrous metal powder metallurgy materials. The invention provides a preparation method of a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy, which comprises the following steps: (1) mixing copper, tungsten and/or tungsten oxide, and then carrying out airflow crushing treatment to obtain mixture powder; (2) carrying out cold isostatic pressing treatment on the mixture powder to obtain a tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank; (3) the tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is subjected to hydrogen reduction treatment, and a reduced tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is obtained; and (4) the reduced tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy blank is subjected to spark plasma sintering treatment, and the tungsten and/or tungsten oxide dispersion strengthened copper alloy is obtained. The prepared alloy block has better heat-conducting property, electrical conductivity and mechanical property.

GEAP202516508A.title: INDOOR AIR IONIZER
GEAP202516508A.abstract: An ionizer comprises a case 4 equipped with air flow inlet 12 having the shape of triangular prism dividing incoming air flow into two flows 1, two ionized air flow emitters 9 and 10, and mesh electrodes are placed in the channels 5 and 6 formed between them, and grounded grid componentry 7 and 8 in conjunction with electrodes to produce ions of uniform concentration, furthermore, mesh electrodes are covered with conductive carbon nanofibers, and power converter is designed to provide different voltage modes on each grid electrode to charge the nanofibers with static electric charge, and produce positive ions on one side and negative ions on another. The device operates in two modes, namely, low voltage, ion generation, spark discharge mode, and high voltage, ozone generation, spark discharge mode. At that, the coating of conductive nanofiber powder on metal mesh is executed with sintering it in inert gas at 1095-1110°C under the pressure of 35-45 atm. Or by spot welding using welding machine or by spraying nanofibers onto thin layer of conductive monomer preapplied to the surface of metal mesh, and by orienting the surface of the fibers in a direction using an electrostatic field and fixing them in this position until polymerization is complete.

CN121137645A.title: Synthesis method and application of bimetallic phosphide electrolyzed water catalyst
CN121137645A.abstract: The invention discloses a synthesis method and application of a bimetallic phosphide electrolyzed water catalyst, and belongs to the technical field of inorganic synthesis and electro-catalysis. The bimetallic phosphide Fe < 3-x > Co < x > P (x = 0-1.5) catalyst is prepared through high-energy ball milling and spark plasma sintering technologies; firstly, micron-sized transition metal powder Fe and Co and red phosphorus are subjected to high-energy ball milling treatment to obtain a uniform Co/Fe/FexP mixture precursor, then the mixture precursor is prepared into a homogeneous Fe3-xCoxP (x = 0-1.5) catalyst with a tetragonal phase Fe3P crystal structure through a spark plasma rapid sintering method, and the catalyst shows excellent oxygen evolution reaction performance. The synthesis method is simple, low in cost, efficient and high in controllability, the second element Co can be promoted to be effectively doped into the Fe3P crystal, the doping amount of the Co element is accurately regulated and controlled, the Fe3P-based catalytic material of a pure-phase structure is rapidly synthesized, and the application space is wide.

CN121156409A.title: High-energy electric spark milling machining gradient ring punching gas chip removal device and method
CN121156409A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-energy electric spark milling gradient ring punching gas chip removal device and method, and belongs to the technical field of electric spark machining. The high-energy electric spark milling gradient ring punching gas chip removal device comprises a hollow electrode, and the electrode is connected with a main shaft system of an electric spark machine tool through a clamp; the electrode is provided with an annular flushing nozzle mechanism; the annular flushing nozzle mechanism comprises an air flushing nozzle, a circumferential driving assembly and an axial driving assembly; an annular air chamber is arranged in the air flushing spray head, a plurality of partition plates are evenly arranged in the annular air chamber in the circumferential direction and divide the annular air chamber into a plurality of air cavities, each air cavity corresponds to one air inlet, and an air outlet used for spraying air to a machining gap between an electrode and a workpiece is formed in the bottom end of each air cavity. And the spraying angles of the air outlets in the air cavities are different. When a liquid medium is flushed in electric spark milling, multi-directional, flexible and adjustable airflow coverage is carried out on a machining position, high-energy discharge corrosion removal is achieved, the problem that fused corrosion removal objects are accumulated in a machining gap is effectively solved, and efficient chip removal is achieved.

CN121142954A.title: Pre-charged high-voltage power supply and control method
CN121142954A.abstract: The invention discloses a pre-charged high-voltage power supply and a control method, and relates to the technical field of high-voltage power supply control. The method comprises the following steps: calculating an average dust concentration, an average spark rate and a change coefficient thereof by collecting a dust concentration sequence and a power supply spark rate sequence of a space before and after dust removal in real time; dynamically generating a plurality of groups of adjustment amplitudes of proportion, integration and differential parameters based on comparison of historical and current working conditions; the optimization step length is adaptively configured by calculating a control conflict coefficient, adaptive optimization is carried out on PID control parameters by adopting an iterative optimization algorithm, and finally optimal control parameters for keeping efficient and stable operation under complex working conditions are obtained. According to the method, the problems that fixed parameter PID control cannot adapt to dynamic working conditions and multi-target conflicts are difficult to balance are effectively solved, and the dust removal efficiency, the operation stability and the energy consumption economy are remarkably improved.

CN121155223A.title: Flue gas pipeline spark trapping device
CN121155223A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of industrial kilns, and relates to a smoke pipeline spark trapping device. A spark trapping pipe (2) is arranged in a flue gas pipeline (1), the interior of the spark trapping pipe (2) is of a hollow structure, the upper end and/or the lower end of the spark trapping pipe (2) are/is of an open structure, a plurality of flue gas trapping holes (8) are formed in the side, facing flue gas inlet, of the spark trapping pipe (2), and unburnt spark particles enter the spark trapping pipe (2) from the flue gas trapping holes (8). Unburnt spark particles are extinguished under the action of mutual impact, extinguished smoke particles flow out from the opening structure at the upper end and/or the lower end of the spark trapping pipe (2), and a gap is reserved between the top of the spark trapping pipe (2) and the inner wall of the top of the smoke pipeline (1). According to the smoke pipeline spark trapping device, the spark trapping capacity of a dust removal system can be effectively improved, so that long-term safe and reliable operation of a dust remover is guaranteed, and safety risks are avoided and reduced.

CN121159254A.title: Method for optimizing thermoelectric performance and stability of copper sulfide material through macroscopic insulation structure
CN121159254A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of thermoelectric materials, and discloses a method for optimizing thermoelectric performance and stability of a copper sulphide material by a macroscopic insulation structure, which comprises the following steps: firstly, preparing Cu1.96S precursor powder by using a mechanical alloying method, then putting the Cu1.96S precursor powder into a graphite grinding tool, and carrying out heat treatment on the Cu1.96S precursor powder to obtain a Cu1.96S/Cu1.96S composite material; meanwhile, macroscopic insulation structure frames are added layer by layer according to different arrangement modes (including up-and-down hole arrangement and left-and-right hole arrangement); and the obtained Cu1. 96S + macroscopic insulation structure frame mixed powder is subjected to spark plasma sintering, and then the block composite material is obtained. The directional migration process of Cu ions in Cu1.96S in the sintering process can be influenced by the added macroscopic insulation structure frame, migration of part of the Cu ions is hindered, the problem that the migration rate and the electrical property of the material are deteriorated due to invalidation caused by the copper ions is solved, the heat conductivity is slightly reduced, and finally the thermoelectric property and the stability are synchronously improved. The problem that an existing cuprous sulfide thermoelectric material is difficult to obtain excellent thermoelectric performance and stability at the same time is solved.

CN223670355U.title: Lifting type electric discharge machine
CN223670355U.abstract: The utility model discloses a lifting type electric discharge machine which comprises a machine frame, a frame fixedly connected in the machine frame, a mounting barrel fixedly connected in the frame, a piston plate slidably connected in the mounting barrel, a machining table fixedly connected to the top of the piston plate, and an air cylinder fixedly connected to the bottom of the frame. The top of a cylinder piston rod penetrates through the frame and is fixedly connected with the bottom of the piston plate, a filter screen is mounted in the frame and located outside the mounting cylinder, and a sealing ring is fixedly connected to the side, close to the mounting cylinder, of the filter screen; a sealing assembly used for sealing the joint of the piston plate and the mounting cylinder is arranged at the top of the piston plate and comprises a pressing plate mounted on the inner wall of the mounting cylinder and an inflation sealing rubber strip arranged between the piston plate and the pressing plate. Through the structure, the distance between the workpiece and the top of the mounting cylinder can be conveniently adjusted according to the specification of the workpiece, the workpiece can be conveniently machined while feeding and discharging are facilitated, medium fluid can be filtered in cooperation with the filter screen, the purity of the medium fluid can be guaranteed, follow-up reuse is facilitated, and practicability is high.

CN223652951U.title: Feeding device with quantitative function for sow breeding
CN223652951U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of livestock breeding, in particular to a sow breeding feeding device with a quantitative function, which comprises a bottom groove, the top of the bottom groove is connected with a feed storage box through bolts, a vertical plate is welded at the top of the bottom groove, and the surface of the vertical plate is connected with an electric telescopic rod through bolts. The opposite sides of the vertical plates are slidably connected with baffles, and the tops of the electric telescopic rods are connected with connecting rods through bolts. Feed is stored through the feed storage box, then the first electric discharge valve is opened, the feed in the feed storage box is input into the feed weighing groove through the feed guide shell and the first electric discharge valve, plastic in the feed weighing groove is weighed through the weighing device, and after feeding is completed, the feed is conveyed into the feed storage box through the feed guide shell and the first electric discharge valve. The electric telescopic rod does telescopic motion to drive the connecting rod and the baffle to move up and down, water in the water tank is pumped out through the pump body and then sprayed out through the spray head, and the water sprayed out through the spray head flushes the top of the bottom groove.

CN121194571A.title: Film layer structure for improving UV attenuation of solar cell and preparation method and application thereof
CN121194571A.abstract: The invention provides a film layer structure for improving UV attenuation of a solar cell and a preparation method and application of the film layer structure. The film layer structure comprises a silicon substrate; the first silicon-oxygen layer, the Al-O layer and the second silicon-oxygen layer are stacked on at least one side surface of the silicon substrate in the direction away from the silicon substrate; wherein SiO2/Al-O interface layers are formed between the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer and the second silica layer and between the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer and the first silica layer through interface bonding. The two independent SiO2/Al-O interface layers rich in tetrahedron coordination Al are formed on the upper interface and the lower interface of the Al-O layer, and the method has the following effects that 1) cooperative charging and charge density maximization are achieved, vertical coulomb repulsion between the two interface layers is effectively shielded, the upper interface and the lower interface can be almost independently charged, and a breakthrough of the charge density is achieved; (2) a dual passivation mechanism is adopted, electric discharge passivation and enhanced field effect passivation are achieved, and the cell efficiency and the UV reliability are both considered;

CN223684579U.title: Fine hole electric discharge machine for die punching
CN223684579U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of die punching, and discloses a fine hole electric discharge machine for die punching, which comprises a cooling liquid tank, the top end of the cooling liquid tank is fixedly connected with a support plate, one end of the support plate is fixedly connected with a cross-shaped sliding table, the bottom end of the cross-shaped sliding table is fixedly connected with a pulse power supply, and the pulse power supply is fixedly connected with a motor. The pulse power source is arranged in the cooling liquid box, the output end of the pulse power source is fixedly connected with an electrode wire, a cooling liquid circulating mechanism is arranged at the top end of the cooling liquid box, and the cooling liquid circulating mechanism comprises a water pump fixedly connected with the cooling liquid box. After cooling is completed, cooling liquid flows into the liquid leakage groove along the inclined liquid drainage groove and flows back to the cooling liquid box again after impurities are filtered out through the filter screen, cyclic utilization of the cooling liquid is achieved, and the use cost of the cooling liquid is saved.

US2025385119A1.title: ELECTROSTATIC CHUCK
US2025385119A1.abstract: An electrostatic chuck 10 includes a dielectric substrate 100, an internal electrode 140 provided inside the dielectric substrate 100, a base plate 200 in which a through hole 230 is formed, a power supply member 400 that is a member for supplying power to the internal electrode 140 and is inserted through the through hole 230, and an insulating member 500 arranged between an inner surface of the through hole 230 and the power supply member 400. The insulating member 500 includes a tubular first insulating member 510, and a tubular second insulating member 520 covering a part of the first insulating member 510 on an outer peripheral side. The electrostatic chuck 10 further includes an annular member 530 for preventing an electric discharge along a path from the power supply member 400 to the inner surface of the through hole 230 passing between the first insulating member 510 and the second insulating member 520.

CN223670353U.title: Automatic focusing device of electric discharge machine
CN223670353U.abstract: The embodiment of the utility model provides an automatic focusing device of an electric discharge machine. The automatic focusing device comprises a supporting frame; the stabilizing groove is formed in the bottom end of the supporting frame; the buoy sensor is arranged in the stabilizing tank and is used for detecting liquid level change and transmitting information; the adjusting rod is used for adjusting the position of the focusing device; the driving motor is mounted on the supporting frame and drives the adjusting rod to move up and down so as to realize automatic focusing; the stabilizing groove comprises a multi-layer structure with a plurality of shock absorption interlayers; wherein a liquid level adjusting mechanism is arranged on one side of the stabilizing tank and comprises a liquid level adjusting valve, a liquid discharging pipe, a backflow pipe, a temporary storage tank and a circulating pump, the liquid level adjusting valve is used for discharging oil liquid in the stabilizing tank into the temporary storage tank, and meanwhile the circulating pump injects the temporarily stored oil liquid into the stabilizing tank again through the backflow pipe. Through the scheme of the embodiment of the invention, the problems of liquid level fluctuation and instability caused by instantaneous high voltage generated by arc discharge in the electric spark machining process can be solved.

CN223642907U.title: Flow-adjustable small water return device for wire cut electric discharge machine
CN223642907U.abstract: The utility model provides a small backwater device with adjustable flow for a wire cut electric discharge machine, which comprises a backwater valve device box body, the top of the backwater valve device box body is fixedly connected with a support beam through a fixing screw, and the bottom of the backwater valve device box body is provided with a first cylinder; the bottom end of a piston rod of the first air cylinder is fixedly connected with a first connecting plate, the top of the first connecting plate is fixedly connected with a first locking nut, and the inner side wall of the first locking nut is in threaded connection with a first connecting piece. The first air cylinder drives the small water return valve and the first sealing plate to move, the small water return valve is opened or closed, the distance between the first sealing plate and the water return valve device box body is adjusted through the adjusting ejector rod, a drainage gap is changed, the water return flow when the small water return valve is opened is basically balanced with the water injection rate during large jet flow machining, and the machining efficiency is improved. The problem of insufficient liquid supply of the clear water tank caused by frequent liquid supply is avoided, and the influence on normal processing caused by continuous rising of the liquid level of the working liquid tank is prevented.

CN223639695U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of seeding devices, in particular to a tobacco seed seeding and soil covering integrated device which comprises a driving vehicle body, a slotting assembly comprises a left first air cylinder and a right first air cylinder which are installed on a supporting plate, an inserting rod is arranged at the tail end of a telescopic shaft of each first air cylinder, and an inserting cone is fixedly installed at the bottom end of each inserting rod. CN121100038A.abstract: According to an aspect of the present disclosure, a control device for controlling an electric discharge machine is provided with: an electric discharge machining unit for performing electric discharge machining on a workpiece in a machining fluid; and a filter that removes machining chips contained in the machining fluid, the control device comprising: a determination unit that determines whether or not the workpiece is made of an aluminum-based material; and a control unit that, when the determination unit determines that the workpiece is made of the aluminum-based material, performs control for adding a chemical agent that reduces the electrical resistivity of the working fluid to the working fluid.

CN121082997A.title: Rapid cutting machining method through electric discharge machine
CN121082997A.abstract: The invention provides a rapid cutting machining method utilizing an electric discharge machine, which comprises the following steps of: installing a pulse power supply on an electric discharge machine tool, and installing a wire tool needing to be cut on an electric discharge wire cutting machine tool; an electric spark cutting device is installed at a proper position of an electric spark wire cutting machine tool, an anode of a pulse power supply is connected with an anode electrode plate, a cathode of the pulse power supply is connected with a cathode electrode plate, and the anode electrode plate and the cathode electrode plate are both in contact connection with a wire tool; and the electric spark machine is started, and electric spark wire cutting machining is conducted on the conductive workpiece. The machining device is combined with the electric spark machining technology, the machining device is simple, reliable and convenient to use, the machining device is easily corroded under the action of electric sparks, the cutting machining speed is doubled, and the electric spark wire cutting machining speed is greatly increased; meanwhile, the loss of the electrode wire is correspondingly reduced and delayed, the service life of the electrode wire is prolonged, and the machining forming precision is improved.

TW202536905A.abstract: Embodiments provide an electromagnetic lens, a scanning electron microscope, and an electron beam inspection apparatus, which are capable of suppressing an electric discharge between an objective lens and a target object. CN223616904U.title: Electric discharge machine for precision mold machining
CN223616904U.abstract: The utility model discloses an electric discharge machine for precision mold machining. The electric discharge machine comprises a machine base, a double-shaft moving mechanism, a box body, a workpiece clamping jig and an electric discharge machine head. The box body is connected with the double-shaft moving mechanism, a containing cavity is formed in the box body, the workpiece clamping jig is arranged in the containing cavity, and the workpiece clamping jig is used for positioning and placing a mold accessory to be subjected to electric spark machining; the electric spark machine head is arranged above the box body and used for conducting electric discharge machining on the mold accessories on the workpiece clamping jig, and the workpiece clamping jig comprises a bottom plate, a rotating air cylinder, a pressing plate and a negative pressure cavity base. According to the utility model, a mold accessory to be subjected to electric spark machining can be placed on the workpiece clamping jig, the double-shaft moving mechanism can drive the box body to move in the X-axis direction and the Y-axis direction so as to ensure that the mold accessory is accurately positioned in the machining range of the electric spark machine head, and the electric spark machine head can corrode materials of the mold accessory in a pulse discharge mode, so that the machining efficiency is improved. Therefore, electric spark machining is achieved.

CN223588479U.abstract: The utility model provides a graphite electrode mechanism for deep curved surface machining, which relates to the technical field of graphite electrode machining equipment and comprises a quick clamping component, the quick clamping component is used for clamping a graphite electrode, and the graphite electrode is used for performing electric discharge machining on parts; the upper end of the connecting assembly is connected with the horizontal adjusting table, the upper end of the horizontal adjusting table is connected with the rotary adjusting table, and the upper end of the rotary adjusting table is connected with the machine tool. CN223604799U.title: Deep vulcanization treatment device for silica gel tube
CN223604799U.abstract: The utility model provides a deep vulcanization treatment device for a silica gel tube. The deep vulcanization treatment device for the silica gel tube comprises a barrel body, an electric discharge hopper, an air inlet pipe, a first cross, a transmission column and the like, the interior of the barrel body is hollow; an electric discharge hopper is arranged at the bottom of the barrel; an air inlet pipe is arranged at the lower part of the outer ring surface of the barrel; a first cross is arranged at the lower part of the inner ring surface of the barrel body, and the first cross is hollow; a transmission column is rotationally connected to the first cross. By means of the mode that the packing auger conveys the silicone tubes, the silicone tubes are more dispersed, and therefore the situation that in the prior art, an existing vulcanization drying tunnel furnace adopts a conveying belt for conveying, the silicone tubes are prone to accumulation in the conveying process, vulcanization of the silicone tubes is not uniform, and the optimal performance of the silicone tubes is affected is avoided.

CN120985279A.title: Machining method of supercharger turbine shell runner mold
CN120985279A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of die machining, in particular to a machining method of a supercharger turbine shell runner die, which comprises the following steps of: roughly machining an inner cavity of a die blank by adopting a low-speed fast feeding machining method and a cavity milling machining method; a machining strategy combining streamline machining and equal-height machining is adopted, and a high-speed cutting machining mode is adopted for semi-finish machining; an equal-height machining method is adopted for the side wall of the mold, a streamline machining method is adopted for the bottom and the runner face of the mold, 45-degree oblique angle streamline machining is adopted, and bottom back gouging is conducted on right-angle sides through a milling cutter; in the tongue area of the runner mold and the area where the machining precision cannot be guaranteed, the tail end and the sharp corner of the runner are subjected to electric discharge machining treatment through an electrode; performing deburring treatment on the parting surface of the mold; and a blue-light 3D scanner is used for detecting the molding surface of the mold. The machining method combining streamline machining, equal-height machining and electric spark machining is adopted, the partition finish machining technology is adopted, and the machining precision is improved.

CN223518817U.title: Guide mechanism of medium-speed wire cut electric discharge machine
CN223518817U.abstract: The utility model provides a guide mechanism of a medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge machine, which belongs to the technical field of medium-speed wire cut electrical discharge, and comprises a lower processing arm, a wire feeding mechanism, a guide wheel and a guide wheel cover, a mounting cavity for the guide wheel to rotate is formed between the guide wheel cover and the tail end of the lower processing arm, and the guide wheel is positioned below the wire feeding mechanism. A groove is formed in the side wall of the guide wheel in the circumferential direction of the guide wheel, the groove comprises a slag discharging groove part and a guide groove part which are arranged from inside to outside, the width of the slag discharging groove part is smaller than the diameter of a molybdenum wire, the width of the guide groove part is matched with the molybdenum wire, and the molybdenum wire is conveyed along the guide groove part; a guide wire channel communicated with the guide groove part is arranged on the upper end surface of the guide groove part towards the guide groove part; according to the molybdenum wire conveying device, the rotatable guide wheel is adopted to replace a traditional wire guide pipe, during continuous rotation of the guide wheel, the molybdenum wire conveying efficiency can be improved, deslagging is facilitated, the molybdenum wire can be well protected, and the service life of the molybdenum wire can be prolonged.

CA3244128A1.title: SOLUTION PROCESSING APPARATUS AND SOLUTION PROCESSING METHOD
CA3244128A1.abstract: A solution processing apparatus (1) includes a main body portion (20A) having a gas flow channel (30) through which a gas flows, an electric discharge section (40) for generating plasma discharge within the gas flow channel (30), and a power supply section (9) for applying voltage between a first electrode (42) and the second electrode (44) of the electric discharge section (40). JP2025164642A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE MACHINE AND METHOD OF THE SAME
JP2025164642A.abstract: To provide an electric discharge machine and a method of the same.SOLUTION: An electric discharge machine and a method of the same perform a discharge processing procedure on an object to be machined. The electric discharge machine includes a mounting base, and an electric discharge unit. The mounting base mounts the object to be machined. The object to be machined has a machining target area. The electric discharge unit performs an electric discharge procedure on the machining target area of the object to be machined, by a machining parameter, through a discharge electrode. The electric discharge unit adjusts an actual output energy value according to a state of change of a discharge frequency or discharge energy during the process of discharge of the discharge processing procedure, and thereby can maintain the discharge processing procedure in a target processing state. CN120985278A.title: Die machining process optimization method based on CNC (computer numerical control) engraving
CN120985278A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of mold manufacturing, in particular to a CNC engraving-based mold machining process optimization method. Comprising the following steps that CNC rough machining is conducted on a mold core; a secondary grinding forming cutter is adopted, and a mesh structure and a hot-pressing column structure on the mold core are directly machined through the CNC engraving and milling technology; wherein the distance between the mesh structures is smaller than or equal to 1.6 mm, the diameter of each hot-pressing column structure is 1.5 mm +/-0.05 mm, and the height of each hot-pressing column structure is 0.5 mm +/-0.02 mm; and electrode design, electric discharge machining and mold saving procedures are omitted, and integrated forming of the mold core from roughing to finish machining is achieved. WO2025220661A1.abstract: The method of the present invention employs: a testing step S1 in which a prescribed voltage is applied to a rolling bearing in a state in which the inner ring and the outer ring are rotating relative to one another; an investigation step S2 in which a search is conducted, within a first rolling surface and a second rolling surface that have completed the testing step, for an abnormal surface portion generated when a single electric discharge occurs between the first rolling surface or the second rolling surface and the rolling body; and an evaluation step S4 in which, if an abnormal surface portion comprising an electric discharge mark generated with an uneven shape is found in the investigation step, it is determined that the rolling bearing may generate ridge marks due to electrolytic corrosion on the first rolling surface or the second rolling surface, and if no electric discharge mark is found in the investigation step, it is determined that the rolling bearing does not generate ridge marks.

JP2025142940A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE PROCESSING METHOD
JP2025142940A.abstract: To provide an electric discharge processing method with which it is possible to efficiently reproduce the battery subject to processing.SOLUTION: The electric discharge processing method comprises: a discharge step in which a depleted lithium-ion secondary battery is discharged, and lithium is moved from the anode to the cathode of the lithium-ion secondary battery; a charge step in which the lithium-ion secondary battery is charged with a low voltage at which the proportion of lithium returning to the anode is small; a measurement step in which the capacity of the lithium-ion secondary battery is measured after being charged with the low voltage for a prescribed duration; and a confirmation step in which the state of health (SOH) is confirmed on the basis of the measured capacity of the lithium-ion secondary battery. US2025309630A1.title: ELECTRIC CHARGE SHIELDING DEVICE
US2025309630A1.abstract: The present disclosure relates to a shielding device against atmospheric discharges. The device comprises a first conductive element and a second conductive element that passes through the first conductive element, wherein both conductive elements are electrically insulated by means of a first insulating body, and a second insulating body that are connected to the ends of the first conductive element and the second conductive element. Additionally, the device comprises a third conductive element that passes through the second conductive element that is connected to a fourth conductive element. The fourth conductive element is connected to one of the ends of the first and second conductive elements, and the shape of the fourth conductive element prevents the generation of a corona effect in the presence of an electric discharge. In addition, the third conductive element allows the lightning shielding device to be connected to a grounding element, thus concentrating the electric discharge only in the lightning shielding device, acting as an electric capacitor, and producing the flow of electric charge towards the grounding element, preventing the discharge from spreading to structures or people around.

UA160614U.title: METHOD OF GENERATING A PRESET PRESSURE WAVE BY A HIGH-VOLTAGE ELECTROCHEMICAL EXPLOSION TO PROVIDE THE REQUIRED FORCE EFFECT ON THE PROCESSED OBJECT
UA160614U.abstract: Method of generating a preset pressure wave by a high-voltage electrochemical explosion to provide the required force effect on the processed object, in which the required total energy of the high-voltage electrochemical explosion is determined, which consists of electrical and chemical energies, an empirical dependence is obtained for an exothermic mixture containing 60% aluminum powder in an aqueous solution of an oxidant, at variable values ​​of the electrical energy and mass of the exothermic mixture, by which the specific electrical energy and the specific combustion efficiency of the exothermic mixture are determined, as the coordinates of the point of contact of the tangent line to the empirical dependence, at which the maximum chemical energy is released at a certain value of the total energy, and the mass of the exothermic mixture is determined. Capsule is filled with exothermic mixture, into which electrodes are installed from opposite sides, and the exothermic mixture is ignited by a discharge current when high-voltage pulses are applied to the electrodes from a pulse current generator with a capacitance. Before determining the required total energy of a high-voltage electrochemical explosion, a preset pressure wave is obtained at a certain point in the wave zone of the technological volume for the required force effect on the processed object, according to which the calculated parameters of the pulse current generator are determined. Required total energy of the electrochemical explosion is determined through the energy of a high-voltage electric discharge in the liquid. After determining the mass of the exothermic mixture, the amount of chemical energy released due to exothermic reactions and the amount of electrical energy are determined based on the calculated total energy. The required capacitance C of the pulse current generator is calculated, which is then installed in the pulse current generator, from which high voltage pulses are supplied to the electrodes installed in the capsule with the exothermic mixture.

MY209057A.title: ELECTRIC DISCHARGE DEVICE AND ELECTRODE DEVICE
MY209057A.abstract: An electric discharge device (10) according to the present disclosure includes a discharge electrode (1), a counter electrode (2, 2A to 2D), a voltage application circuit (4), and a liquid supply unit (5). The discharge electrode (1) is a columnar electrode. The counter electrode (2, 2A to 2D) faces the discharge electrode (1). The voltage application circuit (4) applies an application voltage (V1) between the discharge electrode (1) and the counter electrode (2, 2A to 2D). The liquid supply unit (5) supplies liquid (50) to the discharge electrode (1). The liquid (50) extends and contracts along a central axis of the discharge electrode (1) by discharge. The counter electrode (2, 2A to 2D) includes a peripheral electrode part (21) and a projecting electrode part (22). In a direction along the central axis of the discharge electrode (1), a tip of the liquid (50) in a state in which the liquid (50) extends is located at the same position as an outer peripheral edge (210) of the peripheral electrode part (21) or located closer to the discharge electrode (1) than the outer peripheral edge (210). CN120599010A.title: Discharge detection method and system for adaptive registration of ultraviolet and visible light images
CN120599010A.abstract: The invention discloses a discharge detection method and system for adaptive registration of ultraviolet and visible light images, and belongs to the technical field of image processing. An ultraviolet image and a visible light image of a discharge area of power equipment are respectively captured through an imaging module; motion vectors of a visible light image sequence are calculated according to optical flow motion estimation in a motion scene through a registration module and mapped to an ultraviolet image for displacement compensation, translation compensation is determined by adopting histogram matching in a static scene, and the motion vectors of the visible light image sequence are calculated according to the compensated image. Zooming the ultraviolet image according to the zoom scale calculated by the focal length and the central point of the ultraviolet image, and zooming the effective registration area of the cut ultraviolet image to a target size; and the electric detection module carries out electric discharge detection on the discharge point area according to the registered image. According to the method, the robustness is improved, boundary offset and nonlinear distortion are avoided, edge linear fitting is realized while accurate alignment of the center points is ensured, and the calculation efficiency is remarkably improved in cooperation with integer operation.

US2025266255A1.title: Ion Source
US2025266255A1.abstract: In an ion source 100 configured to generate ions by a process involving an electric discharge, at least the surface of at least an anode 121 of discharging electrodes included in the ion source is made of titanium in order to prevent a decrease in the power output of the ion source due to the formation of an oxide film on an electrode surface. Titanium has the nature that it forms a film on its surface through oxidization and yet does not lose its electric conductivity even when oxidized. Therefore, the power output of this ion source will not decrease even when an oxide film is formed on the surface of the anode, so that it can be used for a long period of time without requiring the electrode polishing or similar tasks.

JP2025112753A.title: SILICON CARBIDE INGOT MANUFACTURING METHOD, AND SILICON CARBIDE SUBSTRATE MANUFACTURING METHOD
JP2025112753A.abstract: To provide a silicon carbide ingot manufacturing method capable of restraining cracks on a silicon carbide ingot.SOLUTION: A silicon carbide ingot manufacturing method includes the following steps. A silicon carbide single crystal having a poly-type of 4H is prepared. The silicon carbide single crystal has a first end face, a second end face, and an outer peripheral face. The silicon carbide single crystal is ground on at least one of the first and second end faces. The silicon carbide single crystal is ground on the outer peripheral face. CN120467897A.title: Mechanical property testing method of WC-316L composite material
CN120467897A.abstract: The invention discloses a method for testing the mechanical property of a WC-316L composite material, which comprises the following steps: S1, depositing each WC-316L composite material by using laser melting deposition equipment, and respectively preparing multiple layers of deposition samples with the same size; s2, performing cutting sample preparation on each prepared multi-layer deposition sample by using a wire cut electric discharge machine; s3, under the condition of room temperature, a universal testing machine is used for carrying out tensile testing on each prepared multilayer deposition sample, and in the testing process, the displacement of the cross beam and the corresponding load stress after the universal testing machine is subjected to load tensile are recorded; and S4, according to the recorded data, calculating to obtain a stress-strain curve corresponding to each multilayer deposition sample. The mechanical property testing method provided by the invention covers the whole process from sample preparation to mechanical testing to microscopic analysis, and can completely characterize the multi-scale performance of the composite material from macromechanical response to microscopic fracture behavior.

NZ798142A.title: Co shift unit for the conversion of solid waste into syngas
NZ798142A.abstract: According to the invention, solid recovered fuel pellets are torrefied to charred pellets, producing torrefaction gas that is converted into a torrefaction syngas containing hydrogen and carbon monoxide. A syngas stream comprising the torrefaction syngas is supplied to a CO shift unit, where carbon monoxide reacts with water steam to carbon dioxide and hydrogen, generating shifted syngas. The invention provides that the shifted syngas is passed through a low temperature heat recovery unit, where its heat energy is transferred to at least two process water streams that are used as process water during the production of the product gas stream. By utilizing this heat, waste heat losses are reduced, and the overall energy efficiency of the process is improved. Further, an increased hydrogen content of the product gas is achieved.

CN120382204A.abstract: The invention discloses an electrode control method and device for an electrode library, computer equipment and a storage medium, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining the position information of a part in a mold modification drawing file and the position information of an electrode for machining and matching the part before mold modification, and carrying out the interference judgment of the part and an electrode, thereby obtaining an interference judgment result of the part and the electrode; when the result is that interference does not exist, the electrode is not forbidden to carry out machining discharge on the part; when the result is that interference exists, the number of the electrode with interference is determined, and the corresponding electrode state is modified to be discharge prohibition according to the electrode number when the interface is called; and the electrodes with interference are forbidden to conduct machining discharge on the part, and the electrodes without interference are controlled to conduct machining discharge on the part. WO2025259552A2.title: TRAITEMENT DE CHARGES D'ALIMENTATION MONOCOTYLÉDONES POUR DÉPULPAGE
WO2025259552A2.abstract: Feedstock including an amphiphilic lignocellulosic biomass can be processed using enzymes prior to pulping. The enzymes break down the biomass by disrupting the surface or cell walls or by reducing wax or other components. Such enzymes include cellulases, hemicellulases, laccases, peroxidases, and pectinases. Suitable enzymes can be obtained from secretions of microbes in soil organic matter from soil in which the feedstock was grown. If the pulping process includes steam explosion, such enzy matic processing of a biomass prior to steam explosion will increase absorption of water by the processed feedstock. In steam explosion, due to the increased ability of the processed feedstock to absorb water, steam explosion is more effective in breaking apart the processed feedstock. For other pulping processes, such enzymatic treatments break down the biomass, enabling extraction of the desired components from the processed feedstock through subsequent processing using less energy and fewer chemicals.

CN121112792A.title: High-temperature fused salt energy storage and heat release system for absorbing new energy and application method
CN121112792A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-temperature fused salt energy storage and heat release system for absorbing new energy and an application method, and the method comprises the steps: pumping 290 DEG C low-temperature fused salt into a low-pressure and/or high-pressure fused salt electric heater through a cold salt pump for heating to obtain 560 DEG C high-temperature fused salt, and enabling the 560 DEG C high-temperature fused salt to enter a hot salt tank; the demineralized water is heated to 80 DEG C through a low-pressure feed water heater and enters a deaerator; the demineralized water is continuously heated to 160 DEG C through a deaerator, and the demineralized water is pumped into a high-pressure feed water heater; the demineralized water is heated to 255 DEG C to become demineralized water steam, and the demineralized water steam enters a steam generator; carrying out a heat exchange process of the demineralized water steam and the high-temperature molten salt to generate superheated steam at 350 DEG C; and high-temperature fused salt at 560 DEG C is pumped into the steam generator from the hot salt tank through the hot salt pump to exchange heat with desalted water steam, is cooled to 290 DEG C and returns to the cold salt tank. By means of the advantage that high-pressure steam is supplied through fused salt energy storage, industrial characteristics and advantages are met, and reference and leading effects are achieved on demonstration application of the energy storage and new energy industry.

CN120951406A.title: Black liquor combustion alkali furnace optimization design method based on numerical simulation
CN120951406A.abstract: The invention discloses a black liquor combustion alkali furnace optimization design method based on numerical simulation, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the geometric modeling of an alkali furnace in a design stage, combining the combustion of the alkali furnace, NOx generation and a flue gas-water/steam heat exchange model, and obtaining the distribution rules of a temperature field, a velocity field and a concentration field in the alkali furnace and the heat efficiency of the alkali furnace through CFD numerical simulation. Therefore, the rationality of the current design can be evaluated, an optimized alkali furnace design scheme can be obtained through iterative optimization, and the later operation and maintenance cost is reduced. CN120970315A.title: Zero-power-consumption thermal power cold end system vacuum optimization device
CN120970315A.abstract: The invention discloses a zero-power-consumption thermal power cold end system vacuum optimization device, which belongs to the technical field of vacuum optimization, and comprises a front vacuum absorber, an annular water-gas self-oscillation processing mechanism, a gas-gas-liquid self-separation device and a gas-liquid isolation secondary separation device which are sequentially connected in series, and the output end is connected with a condenser hot well through a gas-liquid isolation secondary separation device. The chemical replenishment water is dynamically mixed with the steam-steam mixture at the outlet of the condenser through jet entrainment, so that water steam is condensed, after the formed steam-steam mixture is separated, non-condensable gas is extracted by vacuumizing equipment, and liquid is recycled to a hot well. The device does not need extra energy consumption, the vacuum degree of the condenser is effectively improved through multi-stage mixing, separation and recovery closed loops, and coal consumption and operation cost are reduced.

CN223550435U.title: Large-temperature-difference high-temperature fused salt and water heat exchange steam generation system
CN223550435U.abstract: The utility model discloses a large-temperature-difference high-temperature fused salt and water heat exchange steam production system. The system comprises a fused salt storage tank, a high-pressure hot water storage tank, a fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger and a steam pocket, the fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger is of a multi-shell-pass spiral coil pipe type heat exchanger structure. A plurality of limiting inner barrels are arranged in a shell barrel to form annular cavities of different levels, a plurality of heat transfer pipes are connected in parallel and wound around a central pipe or the wall of an upper-level fiber inner barrel to form spiral coil pipes, and a plurality of sets of spiral coil pipes are arranged in the annular cavities respectively. A shell side fused salt liquid inlet, a shell side fused salt liquid outlet, a pipe side water inlet and a pipe side steam outlet are formed in the shell cylinder body; the fused salt-water/steam heat exchanger is connected with an outlet and an inlet of the fused salt storage tank and further connected with a water outlet and an inlet of the high-pressure hot water storage tank. High-temperature thermal shock damage of the heat exchanger and pipeline blockage caused by fused salt solidification can be effectively eliminated, membrane boiling of water is inhibited, the heat transfer efficiency is high, and system operation is safe and reliable.

CN223416176U.title: Spray type dish washing machine with elbow nozzle
CN223416176U.abstract: The utility model discloses a spray type dish-washing machine with an elbow nozzle. Tap water enters the stainless steel inner container through the water inlet electromagnetic valve. The water discharged from the rotary piston water pump enters the left lower side of the pressurized water tank through a water outlet one-way valve, the compressed air discharged from the rotary piston air compressor enters the left upper side of the pressurized water tank through an electric heating wire and a one-way air valve, the compressed air and a water-steam-water mixing pipe, and the mixture of the compressed air discharged from the water-steam-water mixing pipe and water enters an L-shaped water pipe. And then the water enters a central barrel of a central barrel cover plate of the strip-shaped rotary nozzle from a circle of small holes in the upper section of the L-shaped water pipe. A mixture of compressed air and water from a plurality of centrosymmetric thin pipes on the central barrel of the central barrel cover plate penetrates through the rubber thin pipes and enters the elbow nozzles, and mist water sprayed by the elbow nozzles flushes tableware in the wrist basket. After set time is reached, the motor traction drainage valve is electrified and opened, and water pumped out by the rotary piston water pump is discharged from the drainage pipe through the electrified and opened motor traction drainage valve and the drainage one-way valve.

ZA202409990B.title: SURFACE INTEGRATION OF HYDROGEN GENERATION, STORAGE, AND INTEGRATION AND UTILIZATION OF WASTE HEAT FROM ENHANCED GEOLOGIC HYDROGEN PRODUCTION AND DECARBONATION REACTIONS
ZA202409990B.abstract: A method of producing hydrogen and sequestering carbon or sulfur includes generating a fluid including at least one of water, steam, hydrogen sulfide, carbon dioxide and heat as a byproduct of a surface facility and injecting the fluid into a subsurface formation. The subsurface formation can include a porous rock, in various forms of porosity such as intragranular, intergranular, fracture porosity. The method can further include heating the fluid to stimulate an exothermic reaction of the fluid with components of the subsurface rock formation and produce a hydrogen reaction product and one or more of sulfur minerals from the hydrogen sulfide or carbon minerals from the carbon dioxide. The fluid can be heated to between about 25°C and about 500°C. The method can also include extracting the hydrogen produced from the reaction of the fluid with the subsurface rock formation and mineralizing at least one of the sulfur or carbon in the porous rock.

CN120844347A.title: Ironing equipment and ironing control method
CN120844347A.abstract: The invention provides ironing equipment and an ironing control method, and relates to the technical field of ironing. The ironing equipment comprises a main machine steam generating device, a secondary steam generating device and a water-steam separating device. The water-steam separation device is enclosed by an upper cover and a shell to form a backflow cavity, and the backflow cavity is communicated with the main machine steam outlet end and the secondary steam inlet end. A baffle structure is arranged in the backflow cavity and used for changing the flow direction of steam and promoting liquid water drops in the steam to be separated, and separated water flows back to the main machine under the action of gravity to be recycled. The dryness of the steam is improved after the steam is subjected to water-vapor separation treatment, and the steam is easier to vaporize after entering the secondary steam generation device, so that the heating burden is relieved, the water spraying phenomenon is avoided, and the use safety and user experience are improved.

WO2025217468A1.title: SOLIDES EN GRANULÉS POUR STOCKER ET LIBÉRER DE MANIÈRE RÉVERSIBLE DE L'ÉNERGIE THERMOCHIMIQUE, ET COMPOSANTS, SYSTÈMES ET PROCÉDÉS ASSOCIÉS
WO2025217468A1.abstract: A multiphase pellet comprises a calcium-based material in combination with an aluminum-containing binder or a silicon-containing binder, or both. The multiphase pellet can undergo more than about 300 standard cycles of charging and discharging. The calcium-based material can include one or more of lime, limestone, plaster-of-paris, calcium oxide and calcium carbonate. The binder can include one or more of Portland cement, alumina, aluminum hydroxide, an aluminoslicate, calcium aluminate cement, bauxite, and kaolin. The multiphase pellet can be used to store and to release thermochemical energy. For example, the multiphase pellet can be charged by heating it, e.g., at a temperature of at least about 350 °C, to store energy. The multiphase pellet can be discharged using water, steam, or humidified air, or a combination thereof, to cause the pellets to release heat.

CN120745189A.title: High-speed remote landslide dynamic process prediction method
CN120745189A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of geological disaster prediction, and discloses a high-speed remote landslide dynamic process prediction method, which comprises the following steps: S1, selecting a landslide research area, and obtaining physical and mechanical parameters of solid-phase particles, ice, water, gas, a solid skeleton and a sliding mass of the landslide area; s2, according to the physical and mechanical parameters, establishing a mechanical equilibrium equation, a material conservation equation and an energy conservation equation, and establishing a high-speed remote landslide heat-water-force-steam coupling kinetic model for describing the whole process of ice-water-steam phase change in the cold region; and S3, performing simulation prediction on the dynamic process of the high-speed long-distance landslide through the thermal-water-force-steam coupling dynamic model of the high-speed long-distance landslide to obtain a prediction result. According to the invention, a heat-water-force-steam coupling modeling framework combining solid ice melting and pore water vaporization processes is adopted, the method is suitable for simulating a multi-stage phase change process caused by rapid temperature rise in a landslide shear zone, and transition behaviors among freezing, melting and vaporization stages can be continuously described.

CN120737905A.title: Agilawood essential oil distillation extraction equipment
CN120737905A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of agilawood essential oil distillation, and particularly relates to agilawood essential oil distillation extraction equipment which comprises a distillation kettle body, a sealing plate is in threaded connection with a feeding hole of the distillation kettle body; the distillation kettle body is fixedly connected with a condensation pipe; by arranging brand-new agilawood essential oil distillation extraction equipment, the functions of uniform heating, efficient extraction and effective cleaning of raw materials are achieved, a distillation kettle body serves as a main container and is used for containing a mixture of agilawood raw materials and water, steam is introduced through two air inlet connectors for heating, liquid level changes in the distillation process are monitored by a liquid level device, and the liquid level is controlled by a controller. The opening or closing of a gas guide pipe on a gas guide plate is controlled through a partition assembly, uniform heating of raw materials at all parts in the equipment is ensured, a plurality of bent arc pipes are arranged on the outer wall of the gas guide pipe, the heating range is further expanded, the uniform heating effect is improved, a servo motor drives stirring blades to stir the raw materials in the distillation process, the heating uniformity is improved, and the distillation efficiency is improved. The distillation extraction quality is improved.

CN223372234U.title: Static electricity eliminating, atomizing and humidifying device of PVC powder conveying system
CN223372234U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of chemical production, in particular to a static electricity eliminating, atomizing and humidifying device of a PVC (polyvinyl chloride) powder conveying system, which aims to solve the problem that resin fluidity becomes poor due to the fact that moisture of PVC resin particles is reduced and static electricity is increased due to friction, blowing loss and the like in the PVC powder conveying process at present. According to the device, separation of steam and condensate drops is effectively guaranteed through the water-steam separator capable of achieving automatic buffering and gravity separation, the partition plate and the pore plate liquid remover, the drain valve is arranged at the bottom of the water-steam separator, when condensate water in the water-steam separator reaches a certain liquid level, automatic drainage is achieved, and controllable drainage is achieved; a large amount of condensate water is prevented from entering the pneumatic conveying system to influence the resin quality, the spiral steam spray head utilizes saturated steam to increase the humidity of airflow of the pneumatic conveying system, static electricity and resin moisture loss in the resin conveying process are effectively reduced, and therefore the quality of PVC products is guaranteed.

CN120686761A.title: Method for counting production consumption of pulping and papermaking DCS (Distributed Control System)
CN120686761A.abstract: The invention discloses a production consumption statistical method of a pulping and papermaking DCS control system, and the method comprises the following steps: S1, carrying out the numerical initialization integer of data needing to be accumulated, taking each second as a unit, and recording the data as a pre-integrating variable; s2, integrating the variables before integrating by using an integrating operation module, and performing accumulation once in one second by using the integrating operation module; s3, recording an integrating result in different time periods, and calling a CPU system clock to execute data recording once at 8 o'clock, 16 o'clock and 23 o'clock in 59 minutes and 58 seconds; and S4, realizing communication between the CPU and an upper computer provided with RSVIEW32 software through the Ethernet by using the exchanger, and increasing display pictures. According to the pulping and papermaking DCS control system, a production consumption statistical method is adopted, a novel structural design is adopted, based on process requirements, production material integrating including clear water, steam, aluminum sulfate, a sizing agent and other data is added, a data accumulation function program is designed on the DCS, an accumulation function block of the system is mainly applied, and the principle is that input signals are accumulated once per second.

CN223360611U.title: Steam generator for preparing dry steam
CN223360611U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of steam production, and discloses a steam generator for producing dry steam, which is characterized in that a water channel is arranged in a first-stage thick film heating pipe, and the first-stage thick film heating pipe heats water flowing into the water channel into wet steam; a steam channel is arranged in the second-stage thick film heating pipe, and the second-stage thick film heating pipe heats wet steam conveyed by the water channel into dry steam. The first-stage thick film heating pipe and the second-stage thick film heating pipe are of an integrated connection structure. According to the steam generator, the first-stage thick film heating pipe and the second-stage thick film heating pipe are integrated into an integrally-connected structure, and a water-steam separator does not need to be additionally connected, so that all components of the steam generator for preparing dry steam are relatively concentrated, and the size is relatively small; and the advantages of high power density, high heating speed, high working temperature, high temperature rise rate, high mechanical strength, small size, convenience in installation, uniformity in heating, long service life, energy conservation, environment friendliness and the like of the thick film heating bodies forming the first-stage thick film heating tube and the second-stage thick film heating tube are fully utilized.

CN223344989U.title: Water-steam separator
CN223344989U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of water-steam separators, and particularly relates to a water-steam separator which comprises a heating body, the heating body is connected with a water inlet pipe through a corrugated pipe, a water-steam separating structure is formed by a sealing disc, a round pipe, a connecting block and a water outlet pipe, and the surface of the sealing disc is smooth and not prone to being adhered with scale. The sealing cover is installed on the flow dividing pipe through threads and extruded on the sealing disc through the circular ring, and when the water vapor separation structure needs to be taken out, the sealing cover is rotated to be taken down from the flow dividing pipe. A worker can directly hold the water outlet pipe with the hand to move downwards and take out the water vapor separation structure composed of the sealing disc, the round pipe, the connecting block and the water outlet pipe from the flow dividing pipe, and the worker can conveniently replace the water vapor separation structure and maintain or clean the water vapor separation structure; and all the structures are matched for use, so that the problem that the water outlet flow of the water-vapor separator is reduced due to the fact that threads on the water-vapor separation structure are prone to causing the unsmooth surface incrustation solidification condition is solved.

CN223345946U.title: Sludge waste gas treatment device
CN223345946U.abstract: The utility model discloses a sludge waste gas treatment device and belongs to the field of sludge waste gas treatment. A sludge waste gas treatment device comprises a base plate, a first end base and a second end base are installed at the two ends of the top of the base plate respectively, a kiln body is arranged between the first end base and the second end base, the sludge waste gas treatment device further comprises a waste gas recovery device communicated with the first end base and the second end base, and the waste gas recovery device comprises a draught fan communicated with the interior of the second end base through a gas conveying pipe. One end of the fan is communicated with the water-steam separator through a gas conveying pipe, one end of the water-steam separator is communicated with a storage tank through a gas conveying pipe, the storage tank is communicated with the interior of the first end seat through a gas conveying pipe, a spiral feeder is arranged at the top of the second end seat, a combustor is installed at the outer end of the first end seat, and a slag outlet in the first end seat is located below the combustor; by means of the waste gas recovery device, combustible waste gas generated during calcination in the kiln body is recovered and ignited again through the combustor, and waste gas emission is reduced.

CN120607910A.title: Treatment method for improving water-steam ratio of raw gas of gasification device in coal chemical industry
CN120607910A.abstract: The invention discloses a treatment method for improving the raw gas water-steam ratio of a coal chemical gasification device, and the coal chemical gasification device comprises a gasification furnace, a washing tower, an ash water system, a steam injection device and a circulating water system. The method is realized by installing a high-precision temperature sensor and a high-precision pressure sensor on an outlet pipeline of the gasification furnace, and the sensors transmit temperature and pressure data collected in real time to a control system. By monitoring the temperature and pressure of the raw gas at the outlet of the gasification furnace in real time and calculating the target water-steam ratio according to the preset water-steam ratio correlation model, parameters such as washing water flow, steam injection amount and circulating water temperature can be accurately adjusted according to actual working conditions, and accurate control of the water-steam ratio of the raw gas is realized. The stability of the subsequent process and the product quality are improved.

CN223329075U.title: Device for adjusting steam by using ejector
CN223329075U.abstract: The utility model relates to a device for adjusting steam by using an ejector, which comprises the ejector, a Rafael nozzle, an expansion pipe, a first input pipeline, a second input pipeline, an output pipeline, a demineralized water component, a pressure adjusting component and a temperature adjusting component, the Rafael nozzle is arranged in the ejector, the expansion pipe is arranged on the ejector, and the first input pipeline and the second input pipeline are communicated with the output pipeline. The first input pipeline is arranged at the end, away from the expansion pipe, of the ejector, the second input pipeline is arranged at the end, close to the expansion pipe, of the ejector, the output pipeline is arranged at the output end of the expansion pipe, the demineralized water assembly is arranged on the expansion pipe, and the pressure adjusting assembly is arranged on the ejector. And the temperature adjusting assembly is arranged on the demineralized water assembly. According to the device, the energy of high-pressure steam pressure reduction is fully utilized, so that the consumption of steam in a water steam stripping method and the energy consumption in a temperature and pressure reduction process are reduced.

US2025276903A1.title: A zero emission process for producing syngas
US2025276903A1.abstract: Process for producing syngas comprising the steps of:a) burning methane or natural gas with oxygen and optionally with water steam for producing flue gas comprising CO2 and H2O according to the following reaction:C⁢H4+2⁢O2→CO2+2⁢H2⁢O[1]b) cooling the flue gas coming from a) by heat exchange with a water stream which is thereby vapourised;c) condensing and removing water from the flue gas, coming from step b), thereby obtaining a mixture consisting essentially of CO2;d) carrying out an electrolysis of a steam stream in a solid oxide electrolytic cell (SOEC), whereby steam is split into oxygen gas and hydrogen gas according to the following reaction scheme:H2O(g)→H2+1/2⁢O2[2]e) separating and drying hydrogen gasf) carrying out a reverse water gas shift reaction between CO2 coming from step c) with H2 coming from step e) according to the following scheme:CO2+H2→CO+H2O.[3]

MY200421A.title: A FLUIDIZED BED BOILER PLANT AND A METHOD OF PREHEATING COMBUSTION GAS IN A FLUIDIZED BED BOILER PLANT
MY200421A.abstract: A fluidized bed boiler plant (10) and a method of preheating combustion gas fluidized bed boiler plant, the boiler plant comprising a furnace (12) and a combustion gas channel (24, 24b), and a water-steam cycle comprising an evaporator section (26), a superheater section comprising a last superheater (30) and a steam turbine (34), and a superheating path for conveying steam from the evaporator section (26) via the superheater section to the steam turbine, and a first combustion gas preheater (38, 38b), wherein the fluidized bed boiler plant comprises a second combustion gas preheater (40, 40b), a steam extraction line (46, 46b) attached in flow connection with the second combustion gas preheater and with the superheating path in a location upstream of the last superheater for conveying steam from the superheating path to the second combustion gas preheater, wherein the method for preheating combustion gas comprises conveying steam from the superheating path from a location upstream of the last superheater via the steam extraction line to the second combustion gas preheater, and transferring heat from the steam to the combustion gas in the second combustion gas preheater. (Fig. 2)
