CN120158600A.title: Structure and method for improving air tightness of rapid cooling section of continuous annealing furnace in high-hydrogen mode
CN120158600A.abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of plate and strip production and equipment, and particularly relates to a structure and method for improving air tightness of a rapid cooling section of a continuous annealing furnace in a high-hydrogen mode, the structure comprises a sealing roller chamber shell, a roller and sealing roller chamber shell lining refractory bricks, the bottom of the roller is in sealing connection with a graphite sealing gasket, and the bottom and the two ends of the graphite sealing gasket are fixed through castable; back lining plates are arranged between the two ends of the castable and the sealing roller chamber shell lining refractory bricks, the positions between the back lining plates and the sealing roller chamber shell lining refractory bricks are filled with micropore heat insulation plates, and gaps of the upper end, the side wall and the bottom in the sealing roller chamber are filled with ceramic fibers. The invention mainly aims to ensure the stability of the sealing roller chamber structure of the rapid cooling section, improve the sealing performance in the roller chamber, prevent excessive hydrogen medium from overflowing to the slow cooling section and the overaging section, save the consumption of hydrogen energy and ensure the safety of a unit.

CN119468049A.title: High-temperature solid hydrogen storage and SOEC coupling hydrogen production and storage integrated system and method
CN119468049A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-temperature solid hydrogen storage and SOEC coupling hydrogen production and storage integrated system and method. The system comprises a water supply device, and the end of the water supply device is connected with a suction device; one end of the recovery device is connected with the suction device, and the other end is connected with a reaction device; the SOEC electrolytic reactor is connected with the reaction device, the SOEC electrolytic reactor comprises an anode end and a cathode end, and the anode end is connected with the recovery device; one end of the air delivery device is mounted between the reaction device and the SOEC electrolytic reactor, and the other end of the air delivery device is connected with a hydrogen high-temperature heat recovery device; the first end of the hydrogen medium-temperature heat recoverer is connected with the hydrogen high-temperature heat recovery device, the second end of the hydrogen medium-temperature heat recoverer is connected with the reaction device, the third end of the hydrogen medium-temperature heat recoverer is connected with a condenser, the fourth end of the hydrogen medium-temperature heat recoverer is connected with a dryer, and the condenser is connected with the dryer. Medium-temperature and high-temperature heat energy released in the hydrogen storage process of the high-temperature metal hydride is recycled through the heat recycling device and used for producing high-temperature superheated steam needed by SOEC electrolysis, and the good heat and mass synergistic effect is achieved on the whole.

CN223404691U.title: Methane hydrogen regeneration olefin recovery system
CN223404691U.abstract: The system is characterized in that the input end of a methane hydrogen heater is communicated with a demethanizer, and the output end of the methane hydrogen heater is communicated with the input end of a liquid phase dryer; the output end of the mixed C4 heater is communicated between the output end of the methane hydrogen heater and the input end of the liquid phase dryer; the output end of the gas-liquid separation tank is communicated with the input end of the regenerated methane hydrogen coalescer; and the output end of the regenerated methane hydrogen coalescer is communicated with the input end of an external fuel pipe network. According to the system for regenerating and recycling olefin by using methane hydrogen, disclosed by the invention, a mixed C4 and methane hydrogen medium is self-produced, so that the purpose of regenerating and recycling ethylene-propylene olefin substances by using the liquid-phase dryer is achieved, the nitrogen consumption and the torch gas emission are reduced, and the ethylene-propylene yield and the resource utilization rate are improved.

CN119909468A.title: Medium filtering method and device based on hydrogen purity instrument
CN119909468A.abstract: The invention discloses a medium filtering method and device based on a hydrogen purity instrument. The method comprises the following steps: connecting a sampling pipe to a source of a medium to be measured so as to conveniently introduce the medium; the other end of the sampling pipe is connected with the filtering device, so that the medium passes through the sampling pipe before entering the filtering device; the filtered oil mist is adsorbed and sampled through a filter element in the filtering device, and the oil mist is separated from the hydrogen medium; oil gathered in the filtering device is introduced into the oil storage tank through the drainage pipe; a pressure sensing module and an automatic oil drain valve are installed at the bottom of the oil storage tank. According to the medium filtering method and device based on the hydrogen purity instrument, on one hand, the measurement accuracy of hydrogen purity parameters is improved, a reliable basis is provided for operators to monitor and maintain the purity of hydrogen, and the operation economy and safety of a generator are guaranteed; on the other hand, the automatic oil discharging valve is adopted to achieve the automatic sewage discharging function, the daily maintenance workload is reduced, and the automation level of equipment is improved.

CN119198066A.abstract: The invention discloses a safety monitoring method and equipment of a vehicle-mounted hydrogen storage system and a storage medium, the vehicle-mounted hydrogen storage system comprises a hydrogen in-pile stop valve, a hydrogen discharge valve, a hydrogen storage bottle, a pressure reducing valve and a hydrogen medium-pressure sensor, and the hydrogen medium-pressure sensor, the pressure reducing valve and the hydrogen in-pile stop valve are sequentially arranged on a pipeline between the hydrogen storage bottle and a fuel cell stack; the method comprises the following steps: acquiring a first opening and closing state of a hydrogen inlet pile stop valve, a second opening and closing state of the hydrogen discharge valve and medium-pressure pressure detected by a hydrogen medium-pressure sensor; determining a fault level threshold according to the first opening and closing state and the second opening and closing state; and determining the fault level of the medium-pressure pressure according to the medium-pressure pressure and the fault level threshold. The fault level is judged by combining the opening and closing states of the hydrogen reactor inlet stop valve and the hydrogen discharge valve, so that the misjudgment and false alarm of the medium-pressure pressure fault under different operation conditions can be effectively avoided, and the accuracy of safety monitoring is improved.

CN119244528A.title: Liquid hydrogen conveying centrifugal pump
CN119244528A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen conveying centrifugal pump which comprises a rotor assembly, an inner shell assembly and an outer shell assembly. The rotor assembly is sleeved in the inner shell assembly to form a core; and the core is sleeved in the outer shell assembly. A multi-stage centrifugal pump structure is adopted for conveying a liquid hydrogen medium, and a three-stage centrifugal wheel with long blades, middle blades and short blades, a radial inlet annular inlet shell, a combined inter-stage overflowing structure with radial guide blades and reverse guide blades and a combined sealing structure with static sealing, end face sealing and blow-off isolation sealing are adopted. By adopting a mounting mode which is compact in structure and convenient to disassemble, the liquid hydrogen medium can be transferred from an offshore transport ship to a storage tank, from the storage tank to the storage tank, from the storage tank to a tank car and the like; the whole structure is simple, and disassembly, assembly, disassembly and replacement are convenient; and the technical blank is filled.

CN118463032A.title: Fast-response liquid hydrogen storage and supply system and method
CN118463032A.abstract: The invention discloses a fast-response liquid hydrogen storage and supply system and method, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen-air fuel cells. The system comprises a liquid hydrogen storage tank, an air temperature box, a temperature control heat exchanger and a fuel cell. The high-pressure hydrogen cylinder is used as a supplement when the hydrogen elimination amount of the system is sharply increased, the high-pressure hydrogen cylinder is located in the air temperature box, the high-pressure hydrogen cylinder is cooled through gasification heat of low-temperature liquid hydrogen, the hydrogen filling amount can be effectively increased, and the adverse factor of overheating in the high-pressure hydrogen filling process can be overcome. The liquid hydrogen medium is heated step by step through the air temperature box and the temperature control heat exchanger, more evaporation heat is cooled by the air temperature box, less sensible heat is cooled by the temperature control heat exchanger with the adjustable power, and the energy utilization efficiency and the temperature control precision of the system can be effectively improved. In addition, the high-pressure hydrogen pipeline and the liquid hydrogen pipeline are arranged in parallel and are provided with regulating valves for regulating the flow of gaseous hydrogen fuel, so that the regulation dimension of the system can be increased, and the control capability of hydrogen fuel pressure and flow information can be enhanced.

CN118482345A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen leakage diffusion safety protection system and method, and relates to the technical field of liquid hydrogen medium safety utilization. CN119062897A.title: Normal pressure storage tank for storing liquid hydrogen
CN119062897A.abstract: The invention provides a normal pressure storage tank for liquid hydrogen storage. The normal pressure storage tank comprises an inner tank made of metal and used for containing a low-temperature liquid hydrogen medium, an outer tank located outside the inner tank and made of metal, a heat insulation interlayer located in an interlayer between the inner tank and the outer tank and playing a heat insulation role, and a cold shield arranged in the heat insulation interlayer. The cold shield comprises a cold shield coil pipe which is made of a metal material and is coiled in the heat insulation interlayer, the inlet end of the cold shield coil pipe is connected with a boil-off gas outlet of the gas phase space at the top of the inner tank, and the outlet end of the cold shield coil pipe penetrates through the outer tank, extends out of the outer tank and is connected with a boil-off gas recovery device. The cold shield medium entering the cold shield is the liquid hydrogen evaporation gas in the inner tank, the defect that the daily evaporation rate of the liquid hydrogen low-temperature normal-pressure storage technology is high can be overcome without introducing an external cold source, and the operation cost of the normal-pressure storage tank is reduced.

CN118391579A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen vaporization system and method, and relates to the technical field of liquid hydrogen. KR20240105888A.abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide an electrolyte for a secondary battery capable of improving high-temperature storage characteristics and high-temperature lifespan characteristics of a lithium secondary battery, and a secondary battery including the same. CN117865069A.abstract: The invention relates to a hydrogen purification method for removing carbon monoxide by using a molecular sieve, which adopts a purification device to carry out carbon monoxide removal on input hydrogen containing carbon monoxide. CN117824953A.title: Multi-state liquid hydrogen valve testing device and testing method thereof
CN117824953A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of valve testing and performance detection, in particular to a multi-state liquid hydrogen valve testing device and a testing method thereof.The multi-state liquid hydrogen valve testing device comprises a helium pressurizing pipeline, a high-pressure helium tank, a helium switching valve, a first helium pressure reducing valve, a first helium stop valve and a first pressure sensor. According to the invention, by regulating and controlling the temperature and pressure parameters of the liquid hydrogen medium before and after the liquid hydrogen medium flows through the test valve, the test of various complex working conditions such as supercritical hydrogen, supercooled hydrogen, transcritical hydrogen and the like can be realized besides a conventional saturated state; by adjusting the flow of liquid hydrogen before and after flowing through the test valve, the test of two working conditions of stable flow and fluctuating flow can be realized; and meanwhile, the helium mass spectrometer, the flowmeter and other devices are arranged, so that the testing contents of inner leakage, outer leakage and the like of the valve can be effectively realized. Generally speaking, the device not only can realize the conventional test of the liquid hydrogen valve, but also can realize various complex content tests, has the advantages of simple structure, convenience in operation and the like, and is beneficial to popularization and application.

CN220268467U.title: Liquid hydrogen low-temperature stop valve
CN220268467U.abstract: The liquid hydrogen low-temperature stop valve particularly relates to the field of stop valves and comprises a main body mechanism, the main body mechanism comprises a valve body, a first through groove is formed in the valve body, second through grooves communicated with the first through groove are formed in the two sides of the first through groove, and a valve element is inserted into the first through groove in an up-down sliding state. A valve rod is fixedly installed at the top of the valve element, the valve rod can be arranged in the first through groove in a reciprocating motion state in the axial direction of the valve rod, a valve body lengthening pipe is fixedly installed at the top of the valve body, and the outer wall of the valve rod is sleeved with the valve body lengthening pipe. The valve body extension pipe is arranged on the outer wall of the valve rod, and the guide heat insulation ring is arranged between the valve rod and the valve body extension pipe, so that heat convection of a liquid hydrogen medium in the valve is reduced, liquid hydrogen cold energy is prevented from being conducted to other sealing parts of the sealing corrugated pipe fitting, the sealing performance and the service life of the valve are guaranteed, and the service life of the valve is prolonged. And the liquid hydrogen medium storage and transportation safety can be improved.

CN220623072U.title: High-pressure ferrule joint for hydrogen medium
CN220623072U.abstract: The utility model discloses a high-pressure ferrule joint for hydrogen medium, which is applied to the field of ferrule joints and comprises a ferrule joint, a medium channel is arranged in the ferrule joint, two limiting blocks are embedded in the medium channel, and flexible parts are bolted on the sides, far away from each other, of the two limiting blocks; through the arrangement of the first threaded seat and the second threaded seat, after the nut is in threaded connection with the clamping head, the first threaded seat is in threaded connection with the clamping head, the second threaded seat is in threaded connection with the nut, and the nut is tightened in the opposite direction of the nut through the first threaded seat and the second threaded seat; the nut is prevented from loosening under high pressure; the strength of the flexible part is improved by arranging the limiting block in the clamping connector, after the flexible part makes contact with the pipeline through the toughness of the flexible part, the pipeline is pushed tightly, the flexible part deforms, the end face of the pipeline which is cut unevenly can be wrapped, and therefore the sealing performance after the pipeline is installed is improved.

CN117231916A.title: Lightweight liquid hydrogen storage and supply system and method
CN117231916A.abstract: The invention discloses a lightweight liquid hydrogen storage and supply system and method, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen energy. The magnetocaloric heat exchanger for the liquid hydrogen medium is designed by utilizing the heat flow magnetic field effect and vaporization part pressurization of materials such as Be and Ga, the effective heat exchange area of the magnetocaloric heat exchanger is controlled by adjusting the magnitude of input current, and the magnetocaloric heat exchanger has the advantages of small size, light weight, simple structure and the like; and the application potential on carriers with high weight requirements, such as hydrogen energy aircrafts and the like, is huge. By measuring the air state parameters, the current liquid hydrogen vaporization amount data is indirectly obtained and serves as the basis for changing the liquid hydrogen vaporization amount, accurate regulation and supply of the liquid hydrogen vaporization amount can be achieved, the regulation and control strategy of the whole system is simple, safe and reliable, and large fluctuation generated during flow regulation can be prevented.

CN117147745A.title: Device and method for preparing and testing liquid hydrogen and solid air
CN117147745A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen solid air preparation and test device and a method thereof, which can truly realize visualization and component measurement functions of a solid air preparation process under a liquid hydrogen medium immersion working condition, and strengthen the understanding degree of the liquid hydrogen solid air. The cold insulation container and the preparation container are arranged in the visual liquid hydrogen dewar from top to bottom, so that the heat insulation performance of the preparation container is greatly improved, and the influence of a conventional liquid hydrogen emptying method on the solid-air form is effectively avoided. Meanwhile, by adjusting the oxygen and nitrogen concentration in the simulation gas, solid air preparation and testing under various different initial conditions are achieved, and the device has the characteristic of functional diversification.

CN117362154A.title: Method for preparing 2-butenol compound through isomerization of liquid-phase 3-butenol compound in hydrogen medium environment
CN117362154A.abstract: The invention provides a method for preparing a 2-butenol compound through isomerization of a liquid-phase 3-butenol compound in a hydrogen medium environment, which comprises the following steps: in a hydrogen environment, enabling a mixture flow of inorganic alkali and the 3-butenol compound to pass through a catalyst bed layer, and carrying out isomerization reaction to obtain the 2-butenol compound, the addition amount of the inorganic base is 0.01-1.5% of the mass of the 3-butenol compound; the catalyst is porous silicon oxide loaded with palladium, cerium and selenium. According to the present invention, by adding the additional alkali to the 3-butenol raw material, the unsaturated alcohol can be effectively prevented from being converted into the saturated alcohol during the isomerization process in the presence of the hydrogen, and the hydrogen adsorption capacity of the palladium catalyst can be inhibited by adding the electron accelerator selenium to the catalyst so as to improve the hydrogen adsorption capacity of the 3-butenol; the stability of cations of a palladium compound is maintained while the hydrogenation activity of the catalyst palladium is reduced, the diffusivity of the palladium is improved by the structure accelerant cerium, the active center and coordination of the palladium are increased, and the performance of the palladium catalyst is structurally improved.

CN219912655U.title: Fixed high-vacuum heat-insulation vertical liquid hydrogen storage tank
CN219912655U.abstract: The utility model relates to a fixed high-vacuum heat-insulating vertical liquid hydrogen storage tank which can meet the low-temperature performance requirements (including vacuum performance and vacuum heat-insulating performance) of a liquid hydrogen medium, and is economical and practical in structure and simple to manufacture. The inner container is formed by welding a cylindrical barrel, an upper elliptical head and a lower elliptical head, the outer surface of the inner container is sequentially wound with multiple layers of heat insulation materials composed of aluminum foil and glass fibers, the structure of the outer container is similar to that of the inner container, and the inner container and the outer container are connected through three stainless steel lower hanging belts; the pipeline system is located at the bottom of the liquid hydrogen storage tank and communicates with the liquid hydrogen storage tank.

CN117233202A.title: Hydrogen heat conduction measuring device and method
CN117233202A.abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen heat conduction measuring device and method. A sample cavity used for containing a hydrogen sample to be subjected to heat conduction measurement is formed in an inner cavity of a low-temperature Dewar, a sample cavity pressure sensor and a sample cavity temperature sensor are arranged in the cavity, and an electric heating assembly used for heating the sample cavity and the hydrogen sample in the cavity is installed outside the low-temperature Dewar; a hot wire is fixed in a cavity body of the sample cavity through an insulating support piece, only two ends of the hot wire are fixed with the insulating support piece in an insulating manner, and the rest part is immersed in the hydrogen sample in the sample cavity; the top of a cavity body of the sample cavity is sequentially connected with an electromagnetic valve and a hydrogen emptying valve through a stainless steel capillary tube; and the sample filling pipeline is sequentially connected with a hydrogen source tank. The linear heat source is heated by constant power, the temperature of the linear heat source and the measured hydrogen medium around the linear heat source can rise, the heat conductivity coefficient of the measured hydrogen medium can be obtained according to the temperature rise of the linear heat source, and efficient measurement of multi-state hydrogen heat conduction physical properties such as a liquid state and a supercritical state is achieved.

CN117288397A.title: Liquid hydrogen valve sealing performance testing device
CN117288397A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen valve sealing performance testing device, and relates to the technical field of ultralow temperature valve performance testing, the liquid hydrogen valve sealing performance testing device comprises a hydrogen supply subsystem, a hydrogen cooling and liquefying subsystem and a valve sealing performance detection subsystem, and an internal cooling method can be adopted to carry out internal leakage detection and external leakage detection on a tested valve in a liquid hydrogen environment; the hydrogen replacement and recovery subsystem switches a gas purging replacement pipeline and a hydrogen recovery pipeline by controlling the flow direction of a cut-off reversing mechanism, and hydrogen which is not liquefied in the pre-cooling stage can be recovered and reused. And the monitoring and control subsystem is used for monitoring and controlling the operation states of the hydrogen supply subsystem, the hydrogen cooling and liquefying subsystem, the valve sealing performance detection subsystem and the hydrogen replacement and recovery subsystem. According to the invention, high-pressure hydrogen can be cooled and liquefied on a test site, and a large amount of liquid hydrogen medium can be continuously obtained, so that the low-temperature sealing performance test can be carried out on the tested valve in a real liquid hydrogen medium environment.

CN116558575A.abstract: The invention relates to the field of gas storage well detection, and discloses an underground gas storage well detection method which comprises the following steps: making a detection scheme; determining a degreasing cleaning scheme according to the object, and performing degreasing cleaning; performing external macroscopic inspection; performing underground television detection; shaft wall thickness corrosion detection; performance testing; degreasing and accepting; the main failure damage mode of the high-pressure oxygen/hydrogen medium underground gas storage well is confirmed by analyzing the structural form, the main body material, the medium characteristics, the operation condition and the like of the high-pressure oxygen/hydrogen medium underground gas storage well, and a targeted regular inspection scheme is designed for the possible damage mode and failure mode of the high-pressure oxygen/hydrogen medium underground gas storage well. According to the method, the inspection and detection means and the result evaluation method are defined, application verification is achieved in the high-pressure oxygen/hydrogen medium underground gas storage well, the safety condition of the gas storage well is effectively evaluated, and it is ensured that a user can use the gas storage well safely and trustingly according to the given use parameters.

CN117028838A.abstract: The invention discloses an integrated adjusting device and method for a liquid hydrogen storage and supply system, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen energy. CN219930270U.abstract: The utility model belongs to the technical field of hydrogen production through alkaline water electrolysis, and discloses an electrolytic bath flushing device. According to the electrolytic bath flushing device, through cooperation of the circulating pump, the connecting pipeline and the valves, cleaning liquid is pumped out of the electrolytic bath from the alkali inlet in the bottom of the electrolytic bath and injected into the electrolytic bath again through the hydrogen medium outlet or the oxygen medium outlet to conduct forward cleaning on the electrolytic bath, or through cooperation of the liquid storage tank, the circulating pump, the connecting pipeline and the valves, the electrolytic bath is flushed. Cleaning liquid in the liquid storage box is injected from the alkali inlet in the bottom of the electrolytic bath and pumped out through the hydrogen medium outlet and the oxygen medium outlet in the electrolytic bath to conduct reverse cleaning on the electrolytic bath, the electrolytic bath can be subjected to forward flushing and back flushing through the electrolytic bath flushing device, welding slag, nickel slag, dust and other impurities in the electrolytic bath can be efficiently removed, and the electrolytic bath can be cleaned more efficiently. CN115727173A.title: Long-life air valve for high-pressure hydrogen compressor
CN115727173A.abstract: The invention discloses a long-life air valve for a high-pressure hydrogen compressor, and belongs to the technical field of compressors. Comprising an air inlet valve and an air outlet valve, and each of the air inlet valve and the air outlet valve comprises a guide valve cover, a valve plate, a valve seat and a spring; the guide valve cover comprises a valve cover shell and a non-metal valve cover lining arranged in the valve cover shell; the valve cover shell is made of a hydrogen embrittlement resistant material, and the hydrogen embrittlement resistant material is a 316 stainless steel material subjected to cold deformation strengthening; the valve cover lining is made of any non-metal material of a carbon fiber reinforced PEEK (Polyether Ether Ketone) material, a PTFE (Polytetrafluoroethylene) material and silver-dipped graphite; and the valve plate is made of a GH2132 alloy material. The valve element can be suitable for a hydrogen medium compressor with the high pressure ranging from 45 MPa to 90 MPa, and the valve element has high mechanical strength, high temperature resistance, long fatigue life and hydrogen embrittlement resistance; wear-resisting and self-lubricating properties are achieved, and abrasive particles are not prone to being generated to pollute media; and the situation that the valve plate is jammed or fails due to high temperature generated by friction is avoided.

CN116825257A.title: Method and system for predicting fatigue characteristic of hydrogen storage bottle
CN116825257A.abstract: The invention discloses a hydrogen storage bottle fatigue characteristic prediction method and system. The prediction method comprises the following steps: carrying out a hydrogen charging and discharging thermodynamic test on the hydrogen storage cylinder under a hydrogen medium condition; establishing a hydrogen storage bottle thermodynamic model; testing thermal stress of the hydrogen storage cylinder; establishing a hydrogen storage cylinder thermal stress finite element simulation model; acquiring characteristics and failure behaviors of a fiber material, characteristics and failure behaviors of a matrix material, characteristics and failure behaviors of a fiber-matrix interface material and interlayer debonding characteristics of a composite material at different temperatures; establishing a composite material microscopic equivalent volume element finite element model; carrying out fatigue failure test on the laminated plate at different temperatures; establishing a fatigue characteristic finite element model of the multi-scale composite laminated plate under thermal-mechanical coupling; establishing a multi-scale multi-failure mode fatigue characteristic finite element model of the hydrogen storage cylinder under hydrogen thermal coupling; performing fatigue test on the hydrogen storage cylinder; and predicting the fatigue characteristic of the hydrogen storage cylinder. According to the method, the fatigue failure behavior of the hydrogen storage cylinder under the hydrogen-heat-force coupling condition can be accurately predicted.

CN219673355U.title: Ball valve
CN219673355U.abstract: The utility model discloses a ball valve which comprises a valve cover, a valve body, a cut-off structure and a blocking structure. Wherein a circulation channel is formed in the valve body; the cut-off structure is mounted in the valve body, and the cut-off structure is connected with the circulation channel so as to open or close the circulation channel; the blocking structure is formed between the valve body and the valve deck, and the blocking structure, the valve body and the valve deck jointly define an isolation cavity. The ball valve has the transportation state that the low-temperature medium is isolated in the circulation channel through the blocking structure. According to the structure, when a low-temperature medium exists in the circulation channel, the low-temperature medium is blocked in the circulation channel, so that the low-temperature medium cannot be close to the sealing piece, and the flange of the valve cover of the valve body is sealed to be far away from the low-temperature liquid hydrogen medium, so that the sealing piece cannot be located in an ultralow-temperature environment for a long time, deformation caused by the ultralow temperature cannot occur, and the service life of the sealing piece is prolonged. Therefore, the service life of the sealing piece is prolonged, and leakage is prevented.

CN116624752A.title: Liquid hydrogen storage and supply system with low evaporation rate
CN116624752A.abstract: The invention discloses a low-evaporation-rate liquid hydrogen storage and supply system which comprises a first power generation type hydrogen heat exchanger, a second power generation type hydrogen heat exchanger and a liquid hydrogen storage tank, and a hydrogen liquefaction unit and a liquid hydrogen pressurization unit are installed on the liquid hydrogen storage tank. Conventional waste high-quality hydrogen cooling capacity is used for thermoelectric power generation, the advantages of being free of noise, high in reliability, long in service life and the like are achieved, generated electric energy is used for reducing evaporation loss of liquid hydrogen, the storage time of a liquid hydrogen medium is greatly prolonged, and the overall economical efficiency of the system is improved. The novel power generation type hydrogen heat exchanger is designed, efficient integration of multiple processes such as secondary hydrogen conversion, cold and heat source heat exchange and thermoelectric power generation is achieved, the system structure is simplified, the remarkable light weight characteristic is achieved, and in addition, the cold and heat sources at the specific temperature can maintain the stable efficiency of thermoelectric power generation pieces. According to the operation characteristics of the hydrogen storage and supply system and the difference of thermoelectric power generation, multiple operation modes are designed, the electric energy utilization rate is comprehensively improved, and the overall evaporation rate of the system is reduced.

CN218329411U.title: Steam shell-and-tube heat exchanger combination device for heating hydrogen medium
CN218329411U.abstract: The utility model provides a steam shell-and-tube heat exchanger combination device for heating a hydrogen medium, which is characterized in that one side of a heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen inlet pipeline connected with a pneumatic ball valve, and the upper end of the heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen inlet pipeline connected with an electric gate valve A; the other side of the heat exchanger is connected with a hydrogen outlet pipeline connected with a hydrogen temperature switch and a hydrogen temperature transmitter, a liquid level transmitter is installed on a shell of the heat exchanger, and the lower end of the heat exchanger is sequentially connected with an electric gate valve B, a pneumatic control valve, a drain valve and a return water temperature transmitter through a pipeline. And the upper end of the heat exchanger is also connected with a leak detection device, gas detection equipment and a bleeder of an exhaust valve. And the accuracy and safety of leak detection are improved.

CN115325201A.title: Intelligent high-pressure hydrogen valve
CN115325201A.abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of valves, and discloses an intelligent high-pressure hydrogen valve which comprises a valve body, a center cavity is formed in the valve body, a valve element is rotatably arranged in the center cavity, a valve rod is fixedly installed on the valve element, and the tail end of the valve rod penetrates through a valve sleeve on the valve body and extends out of the valve body. A boss is formed on the inner wall of the valve sleeve, padding is arranged on the boss, the padding is pressed on the boss by a pressing seat, and the pressing seat is detachably connected to the valve sleeve through a connecting bolt. The threaded sleeve is screwed on and can tightly press the absorption ring through the pressing ring, so that the position of the absorption ring is stably fixed, the absorption ring can effectively absorb hydrogen leaked between the pressing seat and the valve rod through the side groove in the inner circumferential wall of the annular groove, and hydrogen leaked between the valve sleeve and the pressing seat can be effectively absorbed through the side groove in the outer circumferential wall of the annular groove. Therefore, the effect of effectively removing leaked hydrogen is achieved, and normal use of the valve under a high-pressure hydrogen medium is guaranteed.

CN115013720A.title: Methanol hydrogen production and refueling station
CN115013720A.abstract: The station comprises a low-temperature methanol storage tank, an oxygen storage tank, a water tank, a methanol comprehensive heat exchange module, a methanol hydrogen production device, a hydrogen purification device, a hydrogen buffer tank, a hydrogen storage compressor, a hydrogen low-pressure storage tank, a hydrogenation compressor, a hydrogen medium-pressure storage tank, a 35MPa hydrogenation machine, a high-pressure hydrogenation compressor, a hydrogen high-pressure storage tank and a 70MPa hydrogenation machine. The methanol hydrogen production and refueling station has the advantages that (1) the methanol hydrogen production and refueling station can realize on-site hydrogen production of the refueling station, the hydrogen production cost is relatively low, the problem that the layout of the refueling station is influenced by non-uniform distribution of hydrogen sources can be well solved, and the transportation cost is saved; (2) the methanol is in a liquid state at normal temperature and normal pressure, the energy density is high, the storage conditions are consistent, and the requirements on pipelines and valves in the filling process are low; (3) the hydrogen production and hydrogenation cost is low, and the market popularization of hydrogen energy is facilitated; and (4) low-temperature methanol is coupled with a cold energy and hydrogenation system, so that the integration level and the utilization efficiency of the system are improved.

CN217207753U.title: Combined ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen sealing structure
CN217207753U.abstract: The utility model discloses a combined type ultrahigh pressure hydrogen sealing structure which comprises a sealing structure body, the sealing structure body is composed of a sealing valve rod, a sealing base and a sealing ring, and the sealing ring is arranged between the sealing valve rod and the sealing base. According to the structure, pure hard sealing and soft sealing are replaced in a mode of combining soft contact sealing and hard contact sealing, the defect that the single sealing mode is poor in pressure adaptability is effectively overcome, the requirements for part machining precision and material selection are reduced to a certain degree, and the production efficiency is improved. A brand-new sealing structure is provided for gas sealing involved in the ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen storage and transportation process; hard contact sealing and soft contact sealing are combined on the same sealing structure for use, reliable sealing of an ultrahigh pressure hydrogen medium is achieved, the requirement of pure hard sealing for part machining precision is lowered, the requirement of pure soft sealing for sealing ring materials is also lowered, and the cost of sealing structural parts is greatly reduced.

CN218325225U.title: Two-stage hydrogen medium diaphragm compressor
CN218325225U.abstract: The utility model relates to a diaphragm compressor, in particular to a two-stage hydrogen medium diaphragm compressor, which is different from the prior art in that a first-stage diaphragm head and a second-stage diaphragm head respectively comprise an upper diaphragm head, a lower diaphragm head and a diaphragm positioned between the upper diaphragm head and the lower diaphragm head, the inner surface of the upper diaphragm head is not an arched cambered surface but a plane and is fixedly connected with an air disc, and the outer end of the air disc is also a plane; an arched cambered surface is arranged on the inner surface of the gas disc; the inner surface of the lower film head is provided with an arched cambered surface, and the middle of the lower film head is provided with a circular sinking groove in which an oil distribution disc is fixedly connected; a plurality of upper axial through holes are evenly formed in the circumferential edge close to the upper membrane head, a plurality of lower axial screw holes are formed in the corresponding positions of the lower membrane head, and a plurality of fastening screws penetrate through the upper axial through holes to be in threaded connection with the lower axial screw holes to fixedly connect the upper membrane head, the membrane, the air disc and the lower membrane head together. Compared with the prior art, the utility model breaks through the tradition, so that the diameter of the plunger can be larger than that of the mounting convex ring of the crosshead, and the design and mounting requirements of the high-flow membrane head oil cylinder are met.

CN217951434U.title: Isolation valve with heating and icebreaking functions
CN217951434U.abstract: The utility model discloses an isolating valve with heating and icebreaking functions, which comprises a valve body, a valve seat, a coil assembly, a guide pipe structure, a static iron core and a movable iron core, the coil assembly and the guide pipe structure are arranged in the valve body, and the static iron core and the movable iron core are arranged in a guide pipe. A heating piece structure is arranged between the limiting gland and the bottom of the valve body and surrounds the guide pipe, heat generated when the heating piece structure is powered on is transferred to one side of the guide pipe through the limiting gland, the heating and ice breaking effects on the guide pipe are achieved, and the phenomenon that a hydrogen medium is frozen in a gap between the guide pipe and the movable iron core is prevented. Therefore, the movable iron core is not affected by jamming when moving along the conduit, the operation reliability of the iron core is ensured, and the use performance and the service life of the product are improved.

CN115013729A.title: Middle-high pressure gas conveying system and method adopting double-layer gas channel composite material pipe
CN115013729A.abstract: The invention discloses a medium-high pressure gas conveying system adopting double-layer gas channel composite material pipes, which comprises a main pipeline, a low-pressure accompanying pipeline, a low-pressure gas leading-out pipeline and a gas reinjection pipeline, and is characterized in that the main pipeline is formed by splicing a plurality of composite material pipes through connecting fittings; the composite material pipe comprises a multi-layer pipe body, the pipe body at least comprises an outer structural layer and an inner structural layer, and a low-pressure air guide layer is arranged between the outer structural layer and the inner structural layer; the low-pressure gas leading-out pipeline and the gas reinjection pipeline are arranged between the low-pressure accompanying pipeline and the main pipeline; and the low-pressure gas leading-out pipeline, the gas reinjection pipeline and the low-pressure accompanying pipeline form a low-pressure gas loop. By means of product characteristics and active management in system operation, the problem of gas permeation in medium-high pressure gas long-distance pipe transportation is solved, and therefore the problem of gas leakage in hydrogen medium-high pressure long transportation is thoroughly solved. The invention further discloses a medium-high pressure gas conveying method adopting the double-layer gas channel composite pipe.

CN216667249U.title: Low-pressure liquid hydrogen concrete storage tank with non-self-supporting main container
CN216667249U.abstract: The utility model relates to a main container non-self-supporting low-pressure liquid hydrogen concrete storage tank, which comprises a pile foundation, a prestressed concrete outer tank, a tank top, a corrugated structure inner tank, a hard thermal insulation layer and a leakproof two-layer bottom, the prestressed concrete outer tank comprises a bearing platform and a tank wall, the bearing platform is arranged on the pile foundation and is rigidly connected with the pile foundation, and the tank wall is arranged on the tank wall. The bottom end of the tank wall is fixedly connected with the bearing platform, the bearing platform and the tank wall are both made of concrete, and prestressed steel bars are arranged in wall bodies of the bearing platform and the tank wall; the tank top comprises a prestressed concrete dome and a metal suspended ceiling, prestressed steel bars are arranged in the dome, the main container is a non-self-supporting low-pressure liquid hydrogen coagulation storage tank, the design pressure of the storage tank is below 1.6 MPa (G), the effective volume of the storage tank is 0.4-27 thousand cubic meters, and the storage tank is used for storing a liquid hydrogen medium and can also be used for storing an industrial gas low-temperature medium after evaluation. The problem that large-scale low-temperature liquid hydrogen storage is difficult is solved.

CN114544107A.title: Vehicle-mounted liquid hydrogen valve leakage detection device
CN114544107A.abstract: The invention relates to a vehicle-mounted liquid hydrogen valve leakage detection device, and belongs to the field of low-temperature valve leakage detection. The device is composed of a pressurization gas cylinder, a liquid hydrogen container for testing, a filling valve, a discharge valve, a upstream thermometer, a downstream thermometer, a tested valve, a sleeve, a flow detection valve, a digital flow meter, a water bubble meter, a liquid hydrogen recovery valve, a liquid hydrogen pipeline, a liquid hydrogen recovery storage tank, a transfer injection valve, a hydrogen recovery valve, a heater, a recovery press and a hydrogen storage tank. In the leakage detection process, real working conditions are simulated, a liquid hydrogen medium is adopted, the actual leakage amount of valve hydrogen is measured, an accurate and reliable data basis is provided for liquid hydrogen valve quality identification, meanwhile, the testing device recycles liquid hydrogen and hydrogen, and energy can be effectively saved, and consumption can be effectively reduced.

CN216113367U.title: Gas safety shield system of hydrogen refueling station
CN216113367U.abstract: The utility model discloses a gas safety shield system of a hydrogen refueling station. The gas safety shield system comprises a hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module, a hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module, a hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module, a three-level alarming system, a feedback processing system and a central control platform, the hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module comprises a hydrogen-sensitive color change sensing patch adhesive tape, a camera and an AI big data platform, and is linked with a three-level alarm system; the hydrogen leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed electrochemical principle hydrogen detector and a hydrogen alarming controller, and is linked with a three-stage alarming system and a feedback processing system; and the hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed combustible gas detector based on a catalytic combustion principle, and is linked with a three-stage alarming system and a feedback processing system. The gas safety shield system of the hydrogen refueling station has the advantages of being wide in leakage monitoring coverage range, high in automation degree, safe, efficient and capable of achieving three-dimensional and comprehensive monitoring data and having a grading alarm function.

CN114877140A.title: Liquid hydrogen conveying pipeline
CN114877140A.abstract: The invention discloses a liquid hydrogen conveying pipeline which comprises at least one section of conveying pipeline, the conveying pipeline comprises an inner pipe and an outer pipe, the inner pipe is arranged in the outer pipe and is coaxial with the outer pipe, a vacuum interlayer space is formed between the inner pipe and the outer pipe, a plurality of heat insulation supporting assemblies are further arranged between the inner pipe and the outer pipe, and a heat bridge assembly is arranged at the end of each section of conveying pipeline. CN216046033U.title: Rotary joint special for ultralow-temperature liquid hydrogen
CN216046033U.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of ultralow-temperature fluid medium corollary equipment, in particular to a special rotating joint for ultralow-temperature liquid hydrogen, which comprises an inner ring, an outer ring and a flange. According to the rotating joint special for ultralow-temperature liquid hydrogen, the structure is designed into a double-layer structure, the interior of the rotating joint is a liquid hydrogen medium channel, an interlayer is vacuumized, inert gas is introduced into a gap between roller paths, and the energy transfer area is reduced through a jacket vacuumizing structure; the inner ring of the rotary joint is designed into a jacket structure, so that a raceway and a steel ball are separated from an internal ultralow-temperature medium through a jacket space, the energy transfer area is reduced, the influence of the low-temperature medium in the joint on the raceway is reduced, and the influence of low-temperature shrinkage borne by a rotary shaft is greatly reduced; the rotary joint is designed to be of a jacket structure, a jacket space is subjected to vacuumizing, inert gas is introduced into a raceway gap for replacement, the content of water in the working environment of the rotary joint is reduced, and it is ensured that a joint raceway cannot be frozen.

MY180112A.title: NUCLEAR FUEL PELLET HAVING ENHANCED THERMAL CONDUCTIVITY, AND PREPARATION METHOD THEREOF
MY180112A.abstract: The invention relates to nuclear physics, and specifically to reactor fuel elements and units thereof, and particularly to the composition of solid ceramic fuel elements based on uranium dioxide, intended for and exhibiting characteristics for being used in variously-purposed nuclear reactors. The result consists in a more reliable, special structure and a simple composition of uranium dioxide without heterogeneous fuel pellet additives, approaching the characteristics of a monocrystal having enhanced, and specifically exceeding reference data, thermal conductivity as temperature increases, and a simple production method thereof. The result is achieved in that pores of between 1 and 5 microns in size are distributed along the perimeters of grains in the micro-structure of each metal cluster in a nuclear fuel pellet, and in that located within the grains are pores which are predominantly nano-sized. In addition, the metal clusters comprise between 0.01 and 1.0 percent by mass. The invention provides for a method of preparing a nuclear fuel pellet, including precipitating metal hydroxides, in two stages, having different pH levels. Uranium metal is melted at a temperature exceeding 1150?C, sintering is carried out in an insignificant amount of liquid phase at a temperature ranging between 1600 and 2200?C in a hydrogen medium until forming uranium dioxide, the structure of which includes metal clusters dispersed therein. An X-ray photon spectroscope is used for identifying the new structure of the UO2 pellet and the additional U-U chemical bond.

GEP19950095B.title: Method for Production of Softener for Rubber from Secondary Oils
GEP19950095B.abstract: This method refers to chemical industry, in particular to methods for production of softeners for manufacturing rubber. Technical result is to provide a simplified method of manufacturing and obtaining toxically pure softeners. The production of the secondary transformer oil is achieved in two steps: first step provides contact purification of oil by means of gumbrine aluminosilicate having high crushing quality, the second step deals with catalysis percent of intermediate product proceeded by preliminary regenerated manganese substituted catalyst in hydrogen medium under a pressure of 0.1-1.0 mpa, at a temperature of 280-290� C during 1.5-2 hours.

CN214564664U.title: Hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly
CN214564664U.abstract: The utility model discloses a hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly. The hydrogen fuel cell chassis wire harness assembly comprises a first connector, a second connector, a right caliper wire harness connector, a left caliper wire harness connector, a motor controller connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 1 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 2 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 3 connector, a hydrogen bottle switch temperature 4 connector and a hydrogen concentration sensor connector. A hydrogen high-pressure pressure sensor connector, a hydrogen medium-pressure pressure sensor connector and a buckle. The connectors are connected to each other through the first to eleventh wires. The hydrogen fuel cell wire harness assembly is simple in structure, attractive in appearance, firm and durable, can be stably installed on a vehicle chassis body, and effectively prolongs the service life of the hydrogen fuel cell wire harness assembly.

CN114263845A.title: Low-pressure liquid hydrogen concrete storage tank with non-self-supporting main container
CN114263845A.abstract: The invention relates to a main container non-self-supporting low-pressure liquid hydrogen concrete storage tank which comprises a pile foundation, a prestressed concrete outer tank, a tank top, a corrugated structure inner tank, a hard heat preservation layer and a leakproof two-layer bottom, the prestressed concrete outer tank comprises a bearing platform and a tank wall, the bearing platform is installed on the pile foundation and is in rigid connection with the pile foundation, and the tank wall is connected with the tank top. The bottom end of the tank wall is fixedly connected with the bearing platform, the bearing platform and the tank wall are both made of concrete, and prestressed steel bars are arranged in wall bodies of the bearing platform and the tank wall; the tank top comprises a prestressed concrete dome and a metal suspended ceiling, prestressed steel bars are arranged in the dome, the main container is a non-self-supporting low-pressure liquid hydrogen coagulation storage tank, the design pressure of the storage tank is below 1.6 MPa (G), the effective volume of the storage tank is 0.4-27 thousand cubic meters, and the storage tank is used for storing a liquid hydrogen medium and can also be used for storing an industrial gas low-temperature medium after evaluation. The problem that large-scale low-temperature liquid hydrogen storage is difficult is solved.

CN216091392U.title: Wearable device capable of introducing hydrogen
CN216091392U.abstract: The utility model relates to a wearable device capable of introducing hydrogen, and belongs to the technical field of instruments for inputting a hydrogen medium into a human body. The device comprises a hydrogen source and a wearing article which can be worn on a human body; a sealing piece is arranged at each opening of the wearing article, and a hydrogen outlet of the hydrogen source is located in the wearing article; in the using process, when the wearing article is worn on the human body, the hydrogen source is opened, and then the opening of the wearing article is sealed through the sealing piece, hydrogen generated by the hydrogen source continuously enters the inner space, making contact with the human body, of the wearing article from the hydrogen outlet. The device is small in size and convenient to carry, and a user can freely move.

CN212774751U.title: Self-heating claw type hydrogen circulating pump for fuel cell system
CN212774751U.abstract: The utility model discloses a self-heating claw type hydrogen circulating pump for a fuel cell system, which comprises a circulating pump body, a gear box, a motor and a controller, and the circulating pump body, the gear box, the motor and the controller are connected through first screws and form reliable sealing through an O-shaped ring; wherein the circulating pump body comprises a hydrogen pump shell, and a claw rotor A and a claw rotor B are arranged in the hydrogen pump shell; and the claw-shaped rotor A and the claw-shaped rotor B are respectively arranged in the gear shaft A and the gear shaft B in an interference fit manner. The hydrogen pump has the advantages that it can be guaranteed that lubricating oil in the gearbox cannot enter the hydrogen pump body, a hydrogen medium cannot be polluted, the problem that the hydrogen pump cannot be started after low-temperature icing in the actual using process is solved, the problem that hydrogen pressurization is difficult is solved, and meanwhile good efficiency and low-level noise are achieved.

CN215258148U.title: High-pressure valve for hydrogen medium
CN215258148U.abstract: The utility model discloses a high-pressure valve for hydrogen medium, which comprises a valve body, a sectional type valve rod and a sealing filler, the sectional type valve rod is arranged in the valve body and comprises an upper section valve rod and a lower section valve rod, the diameter of the upper section valve rod is smaller than that of the lower section valve rod, and the connection transition position of the upper section valve rod and the lower section valve rod is a conical surface; the upper section valve rod is sleeved with the sealing filler, the sealing filler is connected with the upper section valve rod in a sealing contact fit mode, and the lower portion of the sealing filler is provided with an inner inverted-cone-shaped face matched with the cone-shaped face in a sealing contact fit mode. The sectional type valve rod is divided into an upper sealing section and a lower auxiliary sealing section, the sealing filler extrudes and tightly holds the upper section of the valve rod to form sealing during upper sealing, and the conical surface of the lower section of the valve rod abuts against the sealing gasket at the middle bottom of the sealing filler during lower auxiliary sealing, so that the sealing gasket is not only pre-tightening force brought by a pressing nut, but also the sealing gasket is not easy to deform. External pressure is obtained at the key position of sealing, so that the valve rod and the sealing filler are matched more tightly, and sealing is more reliable.

UA65632C2.title: METHOD FOR PRODUCTION OF IRON POWDER IN UNITS OF CONTINUOUS OPERATION
UA65632C2.abstract: Invention relates to special treatment of metal powders, predominantly to the processes of reduction and reducing annealing of metal powders with use of a gaseous reducer, and it can be used in the processes of chemicothermal treatment of powder materials in powder metallurgy. The method for production of iron powder in the units of continuous operation includes reduction of iron oxides in the hydrogen medium, grinding of reduced material, annealing and cooling in the medium of fresh hydrogen with subsequent grinding of the annealed material. The deep-dried hydrogen is subject to cooling and annealing, the moisture content in which makes 0.004 - 0.062 per cent by volume. The hydrogen after annealing is cooled, purified to the moisture content of 1.7 - 4.5 per cent by volume, compressed and reduced. After reduction the hydrogen is selected, cooled, cleaned, hydrated, cooled and dried to the moisture content of 0.1 - 0.8 per cent by volume and reduced material is cooled. The resulting hydrogen after cooling of reduced material is mixed with purified hydrogen after annealing and is reduced. Invention ensures the completeness of hydrogen use as a chemical agent and improves the quality of produced powder with reduction of power consumption.

CN113653939A.title: Gas safety shield system of hydrogen refueling station
CN113653939A.abstract: The invention discloses a gas safety shield system of a hydrogen refueling station. The gas safety shield system comprises a hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module, a hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module, a hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module, a three-stage alarming system, a feedback processing system and a central control platform; the hydrogen micro-leakage monitoring and early warning module comprises a hydrogen-sensitive color change sensing patch adhesive tape, a camera and an AI big data platform, and is linked with the three-stage alarm system; the hydrogen medium leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed electrochemical principle hydrogen detector and a hydrogen alarming controller, and is linked with the three-stage alarming system and the feedback processing system; and the hydrogen high leakage monitoring and alarming module comprises a fixed combustible gas detector based on a catalytic combustion principle, and is linked with the three-stage alarming system and the feedback processing system. The gas safety shield system of the hydrogen refueling station provided by the invention has the characteristics of wide leakage monitoring coverage range, high automation degree, safety, high efficiency, three-dimensional and comprehensive monitoring data and graded alarm function.

UA50370C2.title: catalyst for electrochemical isolation or oxidation of HYDROgen and a method for producing thereof
UA50370C2.abstract: A method for producing catalyst for electrochemical isolation or oxidation of hydrogen, which method provides carrying out the thermal treatment of catalyst material in hydrogen medium, at that the thermal treatment is carried out in two stages: at the first stage - at the temperature of 750-850°С during 15-25 minutes, at the second - at the temperature of 250-330°С during 30-45 minutes. CN211694341U.title: Industrial liquid hydrogen storage device based on argon, nitrogen and hydrogen three-level heat preservation layer
CN211694341U.abstract: The utility model discloses an industrial liquid hydrogen storage device based on an argon, nitrogen and hydrogen three-stage heat preservation layer. A three-stage heat preservation layer of the device is subjected to heat preservation by a supercritical argon outer layer; cold nitrogen interlayer heat preservation, the hydrogen medium inner layer is insulated; a high-pressure argon cooling heatexchanger is arranged in the supercritical argon outer-layer heat preservation device, a hot end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an outlet of an air separation argon supplementing and compressing argon water cooler, and a hot end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an inlet of a supercritical argon outer-layer heat preservation stop valve; wherein a cold end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is respectively connected with a stop valve outlet of the air separation waste nitrogen entering the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger and an outlet of the evaporated hydrogen emptying stop valve, and a cold end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with othersubsystems (evaporated hydrogen is used for other purposes, and waste nitrogen enters an air separation water cooling system). The liquid hydrogen heat preservation device is good in heat preservationperformance and excellent in sealing performance, and the liquid hydrogen heat preservation efficiency is greatly improved.

UA36550C2.title: METHOD FOR PROCESSING WASTE OF CERAMIC-METAL SOLID ALLOYS CONTAINING CARBIDES OF REFRACTORY METALS
UA36550C2.abstract: The invention relates to the field of powder metallurgy, in particular, to method of processing waste products of solid firm alloys containing carbides of refractory metals, mainly those that can form nitrides of titan, tantalum, and niobium: (TiN, TaN, NbN). The method of processing waste products of ceramic-metal solid alloys containing carbides of refractory metals according to which is carried out preliminary oxidation of waste products of ceramic-metal alloys by gas containing oxygen, final processing by this gas of waste products before their complete oxidation, reduction by gaseous reducer and carbidization in methane-hydrogen medium. The carbidization is carried out at temperature of 1250-1350 °C and concentration of methane - 0.30 - 0.35 percent by volume. The invention provides the possibility of formation of solid (Ті, W)C and stoichiometric composition of mix by carbon and due to this is improvement the adaptability to manufacture of solid alloy and its durability.

CN211503776U.title: Hydrogen low-temperature heat exchanger
CN211503776U.abstract: The utility model discloses a hydrogen low-temperature heat exchanger, and relates to the technical field of hydrogen precooling. The device comprises a cold liquid container and a spiral coil, wherein the cold liquid container is of a cylindrical columnar structure; a cold liquid inlet and a cold liquid outlet are formed in the end part of the cold liquid container; the spiral coil is wound in the cold liquid container in the axial direction of the cold liquid container, the two ends of the spiral coil penetrate through the two ends of the cold liquid container in the spiral tangential direction of the spiral coil respectively and are connected with the cold liquid container in a sealed mode, and a hydrogen inlet and a hydrogen outlet are formed in the two ends of the spiral coil respectively; by implementing the technical scheme, the technical problem that an existing gaseous hydrogen precooling technology is low in heat exchange efficiency can be effectively solved; according to thehydrogen cold liquid container, the heat exchange efficiency of cold liquid and gaseous hydrogen can be effectively improved, the hydrogen medium and the cold liquid medium form a hedging heat exchange mode in the cold liquid container, heat exchange of the two media is more sufficient and beneficial, the phenomenon of bulging caused by cold liquid stress concentration in the cold liquid container can be effectively prevented, and the hydrogen cold liquid container has good practicability in field practice.

CN211040479U.title: Refinery hydrogen compression configuration system
CN211040479U.abstract: The utility model provides a hydrogen compression configuration system for a refinery plant. New hydrogen with different concentrations is uniformly concentrated to 99% concentration through a PSA device; the amount of new hydrogen to be compressed is increased; the possibility that a centrifugal compressor is adopted for initial compression is increased, and the concentrated hydrogen medium enables new hydrogen to pass through series-parallel duplex combination of multiple units such as a centrifugal middle-pumping type compressor unit and a reciprocating compressor unit and a centrifugal compressor unit and a reciprocating compressor unit and a screw compressor unit according to the hydrogen consumption and the hydrogen pressure. The hydrogen compression configuration system replaces a new hydrogen compressor unit which is conventionally and dispersedly arranged at each device at the rear end of a hydrogen pipe network in a refinery plant; energy intensification and cascade supply ofnew hydrogen media are achieved at the front end of a hydrogen pipe network in a series-parallel connection composite integration mode of multiple units, the number and occupied area of hydrogen compression devices are effectively reduced, the problem that operation management of all the devices is scattered is solved, and the purposes of function intensification, device intensification, land intensification and operation intensification are achieved.

CN111075524A.title: Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system
CN111075524A.abstract: The invention relates to a Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system. The Metal-hydride ultralow-temperature cyclic working system comprises a protection cover, a metal hydrogen-storagematerial reaction bed B1, a metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2, a hydrogen heat exchanger, a heat exchanger, an air heat exchanger, a hydrogen expansion machine and a liquid-hydrogen high-pressure pump, wherein the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1, the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2, the hydrogen heat exchanger, the heat exchanger, the air heat exchanger, the hydrogen expansion machine and the liquid-hydrogen high-pressure pump are arranged in the protection cover. The metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1 and the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2 are connected with the hydrogen expansion machine through a shell side of the hydrogen heat exchanger and a shell side of the air heat exchanger respectively, and a hydrogen medium returns to the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B1 and the metal hydrogen-storage material reaction bed B2 through a tube side of the hydrogen heat exchanger and a tube side of the heat exchanger. By using the characteristics of hydrogen absorption and hydrogen desorption of a metal hydride, the expansion machine is driven to work.

CN110793860A.title: High-pressure hydrogen test system and method
CN110793860A.abstract: The invention discloses a high-pressure hydrogen test system and method. The high-pressure hydrogen test system comprises a closed box body; one side of the closed box body is sequentially provided with a driving gas input port, a hydrogen input port and a nitrogen input port, and the other side of the closed box body is sequentially provided with a vacuumizing interface, a pressure relief interface, and a breathing port; a first-stage pneumatic booster pump is arranged in the closed box body; the first-stage pneumatic booster pump is respectively connected with a cooler and a filter I througha pipeline; the filter I is orderly connected with a stop valve I and a pneumatic valve I; the pneumatic valve I is respectively connected with a hydrogen gas cylinder and a nitrogen gas cylinder through the pipeline; the cooler is connected with a filter II; and the filter II is connected with a two-stage pneumatic booster pump through the pipeline. The high-pressure hydrogen test system provided by the invention can provide an ultrahigh-pressure hydrogen medium for a test, and solves the test medium problem and the ultimate pressure problem of a diamond anvil cell test.

CN211118745U.title: Integrated hydrogenation port
CN211118745U.abstract: The utility model discloses an integrated hydrogenation port. Relating to the field of hydrogen supply systems, the device comprises a hydrogenation port, a pressure release valve, a temperature sensor and a low-voltage power supply, a pressure relief opening is formed in the side wall of the hydrogenation opening, one end of the pressure relief valve is inserted into the pressure relief opening,the pressure relief valve is communicated with the first gas channel in the hydrogenation opening, a mounting opening is formed in the side wall of the pressure relief valve, the temperature sensor ismounted in the mounting opening, the lower end of the temperature sensor extends into the second gas channel in the pressure relief valve, and the low-voltage power supply supplies power to the temperature sensor. RU2387697C1.title: METHOD AND UNIT FOR PREPARATION AND FINE PROCESSING OF HYDROCARBON STOCK
RU2387697C1.abstract: FIELD: oil and gas production. ^ SUBSTANCE: invention refers to a method of preparing and fine processing of hydrocarbon stock involving heating of stock and hydrogen, preparation of end-products; herewith liquid (oil, black oil, oil refining and petrochemistry remains) charge stock is heated up to the temperature above 20-50C and exposed to thermal and/or thermomechanical (non-catalytic) cracking, molecular hydrogen and/or hydrogen enriched light hydrogenous mediums (natural or accompanying gas, gas and light fractions of oil refining and petrochemistry), if required are heated up separately from charge stock, supplied at greater pressure than that of the heating stage, to the stage of producing active atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals to a reactor or reactor package with a catalyst heated to the required temperature, thereafter produced active hydrogen and/or light radicals are supplied to a stock heating and cracking zone for the reaction; the reaction products are supplied to the separation stage; a portion of gas and light fractions and also unreacted hydrogen and/or light hydrogenous initial mediums after the separation stage are supplied to the start of the process and introduced into the charge stock, light end fractions of reaction after the separation stage mainly with end boiling point to 350-360C, partially or completely supplied on the stage of producing light end commodity products (condensed gas, petrol, kerosene, diesel fuel) and/or partially returned and introduced into charge stock, heavy remains after the separation stage mainly with start boiling point 360C and above, are partially or completely supplied for producing heavy commodity products (bitumen, coke), and, probably, partially or completely supplied for reprocessing by the given method to the start of the process together with charge stock; the stock and/or separation remain cracking and heating stages, hydrogen and/or hydrogenous medium and catalyst heating, production of active atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals and separation into light portion and heavy remains are combined in one device, and the ratio of the surface of the reactor or reactors with the catalyst to volume of the stock heating and/or cracking shall be increased so that maximally increase the interaction (reaction) area of atomic hydrogen and/or light radicals and heated or cracked hydrocarbon stock for effective utilisation of reacting products. The invention also concerns a unit for preparation and fine processing of hydrocarbon stock. ^ EFFECT: higher yield of light end products. ^ 19 cl, 3 tbl, 15 dwg

KR20000004907A.abstract: PURPOSE: A fiber is provided to sediment an ettringite crystalline on the surface of the fiber or the other disposition in a hydrogenous medium. CN110779695A.title: Blasting test system and blasting test method
CN110779695A.abstract: The invention discloses a blasting test system. The blasting test system comprises a safety protection device, a filling and discharging device and a gas distribution device. The invention further discloses a blasting test method using the system. According to the blasting test system and the blasting test method, the filling and discharging device, the gas distribution device and a discharging pipeline are directly connected with a housing or a jacket of a hydrogen cylinder to be tested, meanwhile, a stress sensor, a strain sensor and a temperature measuring sensor are additionally arranged on the housing, so that multiple index tests can be carried out on the liquid hydrogen cylinder with a double-layer structure, and the problems of wrong detection and missing detection of the liquid hydrogen cylinder with the double-layer structure are solved. According to the blasting test system and the blasting test method, the system and the blasting test steps are arranged, so that the safetyproblem of the liquid hydrogen test is solved, the fire and explosion danger caused by hydrogen leakage is reduced, the explosion energy is reduced, and meanwhile, the purpose of testing by using a real liquid hydrogen medium can be achieved.

CN110748786A.title: Device based on argon, nitrogen and positive hydrogen three-stage thermal insulation layers for industrial storage liquid hydrogen
CN110748786A.abstract: The invention discloses a device based on argon, nitrogen and positive hydrogen three-stage thermal insulation layers for industrial storage liquid hydrogen. The device is composed of a supercriticalargon insulation outer layer, a cold nitrogen insulation middle layer and a hydrogen medium insulation inner layer, wherein the supercritical argon insulation outer layer is internally provided with ahigh-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger, a hot end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with air separation argon supplement and a compressed argon water cooler outlet correspondingly, and a hot end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with a supercritical argon inlet supercritical argon insulation outer layer stop valve inlet; and a cold end inlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with an air separation polluted nitrogen inlet high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger stop valve outlet and an evaporative hydrogen evacuation stop valve outlet correspondingly, and a cold end outlet of the high-pressure argon cooling heat exchanger is connected with other subsystems (evaporated hydrogen is usedfor other purposes, and a polluted nitrogen air separation water cooling system). The device has the advantages of being good in heat preservation performance, excellent in sealing performance and capable of greatly improving the liquid hydrogen insulation efficiency.

CN121181269A.title: Magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat-insulating material for low-temperature heat-insulating container and preparation method of magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat-insulating material
CN121181269A.abstract: The invention discloses a magnetic-hydrophobic bifunctional pearlife heat insulation material and a preparation method thereof. The preparation method comprises the following steps: taking expanded perlite as a matrix, and constructing a core-shell structure step by step through a sol-gel method: firstly, in an acidic environment with the pH value of 3-5, taking 0.2-0.4 mol/L of FeCl3. 6H2O and FeCl2. 3H2O as precursors, forming a Fe3O4 magnetic inner layer with the thickness of 50 +/-5nm through hydrothermal deposition, and realizing magnetic suspension response within 20s under the magnetic field intensity of 0.5-1.5 T; taking tetraethoxysilane (TEOS) and fluorosilane as raw materials, and roasting at 400 +/-10 DEG C to form a water contact angle gt; and a SiO2 super-hydrophobic shell at 150 DEG C can effectively block water molecule permeation. The obtained material has magnetic control positioning and super-hydrophobic characteristics, keeps stable heat insulation performance in a liquid hydrogen environment at the temperature of-253 DEG C, overcomes the problem of low-temperature heat insulation failure caused by moisture permeation of traditional pearlife, and is suitable for a low-temperature liquid storage tank system.
