068-417-297-939-618.title: Insulation structure used for lining plate in high-voltage welding type IGBT (Insulated Gate Bipolar Translator) device
068-417-297-939-618.abstract: The utility model discloses an insulation structure for an internal lining plate of a high-voltage welding type IGBT device, which comprises a lining plate (1), a chip (3) is connected onto the lining plate (1), a bonding wire (2) is bonded onto the chip (3), and a collector electrode bonding area (5), an emitter electrode bonding area (6), a gate level bonding area (7) and a collector electrode signal end bonding area (8) are respectively reserved on the lining plate (1). The chip (3) and the bonding wire (2) are wrapped with a plastic package material structure (9), the back surface of the lining plate (1) is provided with a metal surface (4), and the metal surface (4) is exposed on the outer side of the plastic package material structure (9). According to the internal lining plate for the high-voltage high-power welding type IGBT device, the phenomenon of chip sparking can be avoided, the reliability of a bonding wire is improved, and external water vapor is effectively isolated.

097-309-084-495-359.title: Integrated procedure for high yield production of chlorine dioxide and apparatus used therefor
097-309-084-495-359.abstract: A novel continuous process and system are provided for the production of chlorine dioxide at favorable economics and high efficiency. The process involves effecting electrolysis of an aqueous solution of alkali metal chloride, in an electrolysis zone, to form an aqueous solution of alkali metal chlorate having a chlorate ion concentration of about 400 to about 1,200 g/L, and a chloride ion concentration of about 90 to about 120 g/L, gaseous hydrogen and water vapor. Hydrogen is conducted to a hydrogen chloride synthesis system where it reacts with chlorine gas, (recycled, as well as make-up,) to yield hydrogen chloride gas which is quenched with water to provide hydrochloric acid. A solution of alkali metal chlorate is conducted from the electrolysis zone to the chlorine dioxide generating zone. The chemical reaction is between an all scale metal chlorate concentration of about 400 to about 1,200 g/L and an alkali metal chloride concentration of about 90 to about 120 g/L and over about 90 g/L chloride ion concentration. The reaction is driven by the high chlorate and chloride ion concentrations, high reacting temperature and with the hydrochloric acid injected through multi-capillary tubes at high velocity. The reaction provides chlorine dioxide gas with some by-product chlorine, which is at least in part separated by an auxiliary chlorine dioxide absorbing in-loop system. The unreacted chlorate/chloride solution from the chlorine dioxide generator is recycled to the electrolysis zone. The alkali metal is sodium or lithium at the very high chlorate ion concentrations. The method includes methods for recovering chlorine as gas or an equivalent chloride for recycling within the process system.

090-308-841-645-184.title: 一种具有消除电弧功能的电捕焦油器
090-308-841-645-184.abstract: 本实用新型涉及电捕焦油器技术领域，公开了一种具有消除电弧功能的电捕焦油器，包括电捕焦油器主体，所述电捕焦油器主体的前表面开设有盖槽，所述盖槽的内壁上下两端均开设有孔，所述盖槽的内部安装有盖板，所述盖槽的内部设置有除湿装置，所述盖槽的内部两侧均安装有固定装置，通过设置除湿装置，可以对电捕焦油器主体内部的水蒸气进行吸收，防止电捕焦油器主体的内部由于“爬电现象”产生电弧，导致火花放电，引发不必要的危险，加强了安全性，增强了实用性，通过安装固定装置，可以快速对盖板进行安装，通过转动固定装置，可以将盖板紧紧抵靠在盖槽内壁的孔内，加强了稳定性，增强了实用性。

088-304-429-296-760.title: Medium-frequency induction melting furnace capable of preventing creepage and sparks
088-304-429-296-760.abstract: The utility model provides a medium-frequency induction melting furnace capable of preventing creepage and sparks. The medium-frequency induction melting furnace comprises an induction coil and a lower part pouring block and has the characteristics that an anti-creepage slot is arranged at the lower part pouring block; the anti-creepage slot is positioned at the part contacted with the induction coil; the size of the anti-creepage slot is larger than the size of the induction coil. The medium-frequency induction melting furnace capable of preventing creepage and sparks has the advantages that the induction coil and a magnetic yoke are not positioned in the same plane, so the creepage distance is increased; a dredge hole is used for discharging metal powder dust generated in the operation of melting and the water steam emitted in the sintering process of a fireproof furnace lining oven, an insulation material between the steel structural bottom steel plate of the furnace body and the lower part pouring block is prevented from being carbonized, and the occurrence of a creepage spark fault of the medium-frequency induction melting furnace is effectively prevented.

099-706-983-553-366.title: INTEGRATED POWER MODULE
099-706-983-553-366.abstract: An integrated power module for generating thermal and electrical power is provided within a housing (110) which includes inlets for fuel (156) and for air (112), a reformer chamber (116), a fuel cell stack (118), and a combustion chamber (120). Oxygen-containing gas, such as air, is introduced into the module along path (114) in one direction in heat-exchange relationship with reaction products produced in the reaction chamber traveling in an adjacent path, preferably in an opposite direction, to preheat the incoming oxygen-containing gas. A nozzle (169) having an injector for the fuel and for the oxygen-containing gas delivers these gases to the interior of the reformer chamber, where the ignition is supplied by a suitable device. The reaction products from the reformer chamber are fed to a fuel cell which will consume certain of the reaction products, such as hydrogen gas, with oxygen provided from the reaction chamber acting as an oxidizing gas. Exchange between a cathode and an anode will effect the generation of current, as well as the production of water, which normally will be absorbed as steam and passed from the fuel cell. The current generated by the fuel cell can be delivered externally to a user, while hydrogen may be combusted downstream in the combustion chamber to provide an added thermal energy source for heating. In alternative embodiments of the power module, the fuel cell is used as a shift reactor and hydrogen purification device. The primary product of this module is purified hydrogen gas in addition to heat.

106-328-355-197-758.title: 一种上抽下滤侧吸混凝土仿石路侧石成型装置
106-328-355-197-758.abstract: 本发明涉及路侧石成型装置技术领域，尤其涉及了一种上抽下滤侧吸混凝土仿石路侧石成型装置，其结构包括：上抽机构、下滤机构、侧吸装置，上抽机构安装在下滤机构上方，侧吸装置包括侧吸吸流接头、模腔、模箱、侧吸集流道、侧吸滤隙、集流板，模箱上连接有若干个侧吸吸流接头，该仿石模具通过在模箱的上端部、下端部与侧壁上分别用电火花线切割出纵向与横向的滤隙窄道与集流通道，不必用到丝网与滤纸，模箱侧壁也可实现吸滤，并且侧壁滤隙窄道与脱模方向不一致，有效防止脱模时刮损模体而难以脱模，进一步提高生产效率和产品质量，并且通过对模箱内浆料的全方位水气抽排，更进一步有利于混凝土中的水气挤出，从而得到更高初始强度的湿坯。

110-229-511-812-566.title: Hanging tool for surface finishing treatment
110-229-511-812-566.abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of metal surface polishing treatment, in particular to a hanging tool for surface finishing treatment, which comprises a cross rod, a plurality of hanging grooves, a plurality of supporting rods and a plurality of supporting rods, the first end of the longitudinal connecting structure is connected into the hanging groove of the cross rod, and the second end of the longitudinal connecting structure is used for connecting a workpiece; the handle is connected to the cross rod and extends upwards; wherein the first end of the cross rod is provided with an arc-shaped connector, the arc-shaped connector is used for being connected with the positive electrode of a power source, and the second end of the cross rod is provided with a clamping structure used for being connected to the inner wall of a machining groove. The hanging tool is in a fixed hanging mode and cannot be corroded by steam during hanging, the contact point of the cross rod and the connecting seat is designed to be of an arc surface structure, the contact surface is large, in a water vapor environment, the conductive contact point is not prone to sparking and ablation caused by poor contact, and therefore the hanging tool is small in loss and reliable and stable in structure.

124-885-786-960-908.title: Progressive Cut-Size Particle Trap and Aerosol Collection Apparatus
124-885-786-960-908.abstract: Improved centrifugal particle traps for aerosol particle collection and sampling characterized by a curved, progressively tapered impactor channel operable over a incompressible or compressible flow regime, or a flow regime transitioning from incompressible to compressible over the length of the particle trap. Mixtures of particles in a flowing gas stream are impactingly captured and separated by size. The particle traps can be operated to collect submicron particles without blockage, have lower pressure drops to reduce overall power requirements, and surprisingly, viability of biological particles captured in the particle traps of the invention is increased. Also disclosed are systems and methods combining these improved particle traps with in-line particle concentrators and with aerosol sample or liquid sample processing and analysis systems.

124-372-701-130-726.title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR REDUCING RESISTANCE VALUE OF TRANSPARENT CONDUCTIVE FILM
124-372-701-130-726.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To easily produce a transparent conductive film having a low resistance. SOLUTION: In a water bubbling unit 20, water vapor is added to CF4 fed from a material gas supply source 16, and CF4 is introduced to an electric discharge unit 18. The discharge unit 18 generates gas discharge to cause reaction of CF4 and vapor, and a reactive fluorine gas is produced such as HF and COF2. The reactive fluorine gas is supplied to a fluoride treatment chamber 14 together with a dilute gas flowing into a treatment gas supply piping 40. An ITO thin film 44 laid in the chamber 14 is turned into fluoride by the reactive fluorine gas supplied to the chamber 14, and the resistance value is dropped.

121-496-481-449-596.title: 一种具有防护机构的电捕焦油器
121-496-481-449-596.abstract: 本实用新型涉及电捕焦油器技术领域，公开了一种具有防护机构的电捕焦油器，煤气中含有一定量的水蒸气会产生火花放电，火花放电达到一定强度后造成绝缘子炸裂，并且现有的电捕焦油器内部的灰清理不干净，时间过久会影响电捕焦油器的使用，包括电捕焦油器主体，所述电捕焦油器主体的侧面固接有外筒，外筒的内部等距安装有储存盒，通过设置储存盒，可以对从进气管进入的煤气进行干燥，避免在电捕焦油器主体的内部产生“爬电现象”，加强了安全性，通过设置限位螺栓和挤压板，可以便于对干燥剂进行更换，通过安装清理装置，可以对电捕焦油器主体内部的灰进行处理，通过设置下灰槽，可以对电捕焦油器主体内部的灰进行收集，然后通过螺杆排出。

110-009-448-222-568.title: 一种螺旋藻蛋白粉的气浮分离提纯装置
110-009-448-222-568.abstract: 本实用新型公开了一种螺旋藻蛋白粉的气浮分离提纯装置，包括底座、除杂机构、电机和搅拌柱，所述底座底部左右两侧均固定有自锁滚轮，所述承载箱的底部贯穿固定有电动出料阀，所述除杂机构贯穿承载箱的左侧，所述承载箱的右侧固定有储水箱，所述第二液泵的上侧设置有输水管道，所述搅拌柱转动连接在承载箱的内顶部，所述电动进水阀的右侧设置有连接管道。该螺旋藻蛋白粉的气浮分离提纯装置，水蒸气经过连接管道排到储水箱内的过程中可在冷凝片的作用下得到冷凝处理，水蒸气冷凝成水后集中流到储水箱内，以便下次的使用，下一次使用该装置时，储水箱内的水可在第二液泵的作用下通过输水管道进入到储水箱内，方便供水。

128-709-571-647-300.title: Large-size thin wafer electric spark discharge-etching auxiliary grinding method and device
128-709-571-647-300.abstract: The invention provides a large-size thin wafer electric spark discharge-etching auxiliary grinding method and device.The specific machining method comprises the steps that a high-voltage input end is connected with a column electrode, a low-voltage input end is connected with a ring electrode, water vapor, N2 and Ar are mixed and then conveyed to the position between the ring electrode and the column electrode of an electric spark generating device through a gas path, and the high-voltage input end and the low-voltage input end are connected; high-concentration hydroxyl radicals are generated in a non-uniform electric field between ring-column electrodes, the hydroxyl radicals oxidize SiC to form SiO2 with lower hardness, and N2 < + > reacts with SiO2 to obtain conductive Si2N2O. The conductive Si2N2O is electrified, under the electrochemical auxiliary etching effect, hydroxyl ions in the Si2N2O and SiO2 areas are gathered, the local concentration is remarkably increased, and the reaction rate with the Si2N2O and SiO2 is increased. And removing the silicate surface with lower hardness by using an ultrasonic vibration device. Therefore, processing of low/stress-free large-size silicon carbide is realized, and the advantages of high precision, low load and high efficiency in grinding of large-size wafers are achieved.

132-368-412-232-070.title: Biomass boiler flue gas purification device
132-368-412-232-070.abstract: The utility model discloses a biomass boiler flue gas purification device, relating to the field of boiler flue gas purification equipment. The biomass boiler flue gas purification device is connected with a biomass boiler room and consists of a cyclone, a cyclone tower, a fan and a chimney; flue gas in the biomass boiler room enters from the top of the cyclone by virtue of a dust collection pipeline; a spark trap is arranged inside the cyclone; an ash discharging valve is arranged at the bottom of the cyclone; the flue gas treated by the cyclone enters from the bottom of the cyclone tower; a cyclone plate is transversely arranged inside the cyclone tower; a packing material layer is arranged on the cyclone plate; multiple nozzles are uniformly arranged above the top packing material layer; a water outlet is formed in the bottom of the cyclone tower; a demister is arranged on the top; and the up-to-standard gas treated by the cyclone tower is fed into the chimney by virtue of the fan. According to the device disclosed by the utility model, 90 percent of smoke dust can be removed by the cyclone, the purification device has a spark trapping effect, the dust concentration of the finally discharged gas is lower than 10mg/m<3>, and white water vapor is avoided.

133-073-163-566-974.title: Safe type civil propellant and preparation method thereof
133-073-163-566-974.abstract: 种安全型民用推进剂，包括如下按质量百分比计的组份：包覆剂：2％～8％；主氧化剂：40％～60％；辅助氧化剂：0％～25％；燃料：25％～40％；燃烧催化剂：1％～2％；包覆剂包括液体橡胶和油脂。该推进剂的摩擦感度与撞击感度为0，静电火花感度大于120mJ，不含1.1级爆炸物质，危险等级属于1.3级，因为配方中不含金属粉，反应产物不易引燃油气、煤层气，安全可靠；该民用推进剂爆热大于4400J/g，产气量大于2.8mol/100g，能被电引火头、电点火器等民用火工器材点燃，反应生成的气体主要为氮气、二氧化碳和水蒸气，CO与氮氧化物的含量极低，可用于石油、页岩气开采，煤矿压裂。

156-027-416-118-369.title: Direct-fired waste gas combustion furnace
156-027-416-118-369.abstract: 本实用新型公开了一种直燃式废气燃烧炉，包括基座和炉体，所述基座设置于炉体底部，所述炉体下端设置有两个预热室，包括有机混合废气预热室和助燃气体预热室，对有机混合废气和助燃气体分别进行预热，预热后的有机混合废气和助燃气体分别从上方的气体通道一进入气体混合室，经充分混合后得的混合气体从气体通道二进入燃烧室，打开火花发生器二，混合气体充分燃烧，生成的氧化碳和水蒸气由排气口排出，从而解决废气燃烧不彻底，使其排放到环境中导致环境污染的问题。

138-993-058-974-806.title: 一种具有保护作用的接线端子
138-993-058-974-806.abstract: 本实用新型涉及接线端子装置技术领域，公开了一种具有保护作用的接线端子，包括接线端子本体，所述接线端子本体的前端中上部等距设置有三个连接孔。本实用新型中，将接线端子本体插入连接座的插孔内，然后转动固定螺栓将其从螺纹孔和固定孔之中进行拿出，推动保护座向插孔方向进行移动并与其进行接触，保护座在进行移动的同时带动滑块以及涨紧块在滑槽中进行滑动，涨紧块在移动到固定槽内时，体积变大将滑块在滑槽内进行固定，保护座的前端与连接座进行接触，将接线端子本体与插孔的缝隙进行封闭，防止外部环境的水汽和灰尘进入其中从而引起连接处的短路或者电火花，提高接线端子使用的安全性。

165-408-888-256-204.title: NEEDLELESS HYPODERMIC INJECTION DEVICE WITH NON-ELECTRIC IGNITION MEANS
165-408-888-256-204.abstract: A device for performing a needleless hypodermic injection of a liquid medication contained in the device. The device includes pyrotechnical means for generating within the device a pressure necessary for injecting the medication. The device comprises non-electric ignition means for igniting a propellant contained in said device. The ignition means comprise in particular an impact sensitive primer material and a firing pin for striking said primer material, said primer material being so positioned with respect to the propellant that when the firing pin strikes the primer material the hot products of combustion of said primer material ignite the propellant.

150-261-460-214-320.title: A VORTEX DRIVEN PASSIVE HYDROGEN RECOMBINER AND IGNITER
150-261-460-214-320.abstract: An igniter apparatus which generates a high speed buoyancy induced vortex to funnel hydrogen and air from the surrounding onto the "igniter core" where an "igniter core" heats up to the auto ignition temperature by the exothermic catalytic oxidation of hydrogen on its surface. Water (vapor) is formed as the product, which inhibits the oxidation reaction, if not stripped away from the catalyst surface. The high velocity of the vortex ensures the stripping of the boundary layer of steam that is formed by the reaction, thus ensuring more active sites are available for hydrogen oxidation. The vortex is formed by channeling an upward draft into a vortex by guided fins. The upward draft is formed by a plate, which is also coated with a hydrogen recombination catalyst. The plate becomes hot by the same catalytic oxidation reaction in the presence of air containing hydrogen.

144-904-237-372-763.title: Novel grating AC drive output circuit system
144-904-237-372-763.abstract: 本发明公开了一种光栅新型交流驱动输出电路系统，其结构包括稳压器壳、总电极、电路板、线圈、转子、凑贴装置。有益效果：本发明利用设有的贴串机构，在贴角组件与分流弧的相互配合作用下，有利于实现对线圈与碳刷相贴合时做紧凑贴合，继而避免因线圈表面不光滑而导致电流出现瞬时较大，并产生火花现象，与此同时在出现有电流较大时，通过分流弧与引线的配合实现对瞬时电流的分流使其呈串流，本发明利用设有的整滑结构，对线圈表面附着有的水汽以及其他的杂质做吸收处理，从而避免因该杂质的覆盖出现有线圈运作时散热不及时以及腐蚀现象的产生。

177-559-790-461-668.title: DEVICE WITH PLASMA FROM MOBILE ELECTRIC DISCHARGES AND ITS APPLICATIONS TO CONVERT CARBON MATTER
177-559-790-461-668.abstract: A process and system for using plasma from mobile electric discharges for conversion of a carbon substance. The process and system (R) use plasma from mobile electric discharges (7) for conversion of carbon substances, such as light hydrocarbons, heavy hydrocarbons or residues from refining these, CO2 or CO into products such as gases containing CO and/or H2 and/or C2H4 and C2H 2 and/or liquid carbon fuels. The conversions are based on oxidation and/or cracking of the matter in the presence of water vapor and of gas such as CO2, O2, N2, H2, alone or mixed. The system generates a non-equilibrium plasma by very rapidly stretching the discharges (7) established between at least one fixed electrode (r, s, t) and at least one mobile electrode (d). The non-equilibrium plasma sweeps the gas passing through the reactor in order to stimulate chemical conversions. The flow of the matter activated by the plasma entering through (k) may pass through one or more discharge stages (d1, d2, d3, d4) and may be brought into contact with a metal or ceramic body placed near the discharges before exiting through (1). This body becomes active in the presence of the catalytic species originating from the plasma and thus participates in the continuation of the conversion.

178-432-519-116-902.abstract: What is disclosed is a system designed to extract water moisture from the atmosphere, highly purify and condition the extracted water, and provide optional carbonation of the extracted water for human consumption. 178-894-578-026-428.abstract: 本发明涉及消毒装置技术领域，具体涉及一种消毒机及其控制方法。所述消毒机包括：电净化模块；蒸发器组件，沿进风方向设置于所述电净化模块的上游位置，并适于对空气进行降温冷凝。本发明提供的消毒机，通过在所述电净化模块沿进风方向的上游位置设置蒸发器组件，并利用蒸发器组件对空气进行降温冷凝，使空气温度降低至露点以下，空气经过蒸发器组件时其中的水蒸气冷凝成水，以降低空气中的湿度，达到干燥空气的效果，使进入所述电净化模块中的空气为干燥空气，减少打火现象的发生，提高消毒机的使用安全性。

181-727-249-977-660.title: Integrated power module
181-727-249-977-660.abstract: An integrated power module for generating thermal and electrical power is provided within a housing which includes inlets for fuel and for air, a reformer chamber, a fuel cell stack, and a combustion chamber. Oxygen-containing gas, such as air, is introduced into the module along a path in one direction in heat exchange relationship with reaction products produced in the reaction chamber traveling in an adjacent path, preferably in an opposite direction, to preheat the incoming oxygen-containing gas. A nozzle having an injector for the fuel and for the oxygen-containing gas delivers these gases to the interior of the reformer chamber, where ignition is supplied by a suitable device. The reaction products from the reformer chamber are fed to a fuel cell which will consume certain of the reaction products, such as hydrogen gas, with oxygen provided from the reaction chamber acting as an oxidizing gas. Exchange between a cathode and an anode will effect the generation of current, as well as the production of water, which normally will be absorbed as steam and passed from the fuel cell. The current generated by the fuel cell can be delivered externally to a user, while hydrogen may be combusted downstream in the combustion chamber to provide an added thermal energy source for heating. In alternate embodiments of the power module, the fuel cell is used as a shift reactor and hydrogen purification device. The primary product of this module is purified hydrogen gas, in additional to heat.

184-770-069-399-405.title: Auxiliary component for SOFC system capable of integrating heat exchange and catalytic reaction
184-770-069-399-405.abstract: The invention relates to an auxiliary component for an SOFC system capable of integrating heat exchange and catalytic reaction. The auxiliary component comprises a heat exchange section and a reaction section, wherein an outlet of a catalytic combustion chamber of the reaction section is connected with an inlet of a start combustion chamber of the heat exchange section by welding; the heat exchange section comprises the start combustion chamber, a spark starter, an air pipeline, a fuel pipeline and a water vapor pipeline.According to the auxiliary component, an air preheater, a fuel preheater, a vapor generator and the start combustion chamber of the common SOFC system are integrated by the heat exchange section, so that the heat exchange section can be used for starting combustion, air and fuel can be heated by high-temperature tail gas, and steam can be generated; the reaction section integrates a reformer, a tail gas burner and an air preheater, so that the reaction section can be used for reforming the fuel, enabling the burning tail gas to release heat and further heating air.

187-814-265-600-314.title: Needleless hydpodermic injection device with non-electric ignition means
187-814-265-600-314.abstract: A device for performing a needleless hypodermic injection of a liquid medication contained in the device. The device includes pyrotechnical means for generating within the device a pressure necessary for injecting the medication. The device comprises non-electric ignition means for igniting a propellant contained in said device. The ignition means comprise in particular an impact sensitive primer material and a firing pin for striking said primer material, said primer material being so positioned with respect to the propellant that when the firing pin strikes the primer material the hot products of combustion of said primer material ignite the propellant.

189-938-927-985-901.title: Device convenient for optimization treatment of hydrochloric acid tank tail gas
189-938-927-985-901.abstract: 本发明公开了一种便于盐酸槽尾气优化处理装置，包括底座、搅拌机构、进料通道、气泵、出气管道、第二电动出气阀、水蒸气循环使用机构和承载框，所述底座下端面的左右两侧均固定有自锁滚轮，收集盒的外侧设置有支架，且承载箱内部左右两侧分别开设有第一反应室和第二反应室，电热板的内侧设置有电动出料阀，搅拌机构贯穿承载箱的右侧，所述水蒸气循环使用机构贯穿固定在承载箱的顶部。在HFC‑134a、HFC‑125等制冷剂的生产过程中，涉及到副产物盐酸的回收处理，本发明提出的处理装置用于盐酸槽尾气优化处理，尾气中的盐酸与氢氧化钠溶液反应的过程中，搅拌杆可在电机和电机轴的作用下转动，使盐酸与氢氧化钠溶液能够充分反应。

187-409-507-385-428.title: 一种可避免打火现象的十路中功率屏蔽器
187-409-507-385-428.abstract: 本发明公开了一种可避免打火现象的十路中功率屏蔽器，包括屏蔽器本体，所述屏蔽器本体的底部固定安装有四个两两对称设置的垫座，屏蔽器本体内固定安装有横向隔板。本发明设计合理，实用性好，即可对屏蔽器本体内部进行有效的风冷散热，又可对屏蔽器本体内部进行有效的水冷散热，并且同时对屏蔽器本体内部进行风冷散热和水冷散热时，散热效果更好，散热效率更高，避免屏蔽器本体内部温度逐渐升高而造成打火现象发生，而且屏蔽器本体在潮湿的空气环境中或者阴雨天气使用时，能够对两个进气孔和两个出气孔进行封挡，可起到有效的防水防潮的作用，避免水气进入屏蔽器本体内部造成短路而导致打火现象发生。

009-894-295-889-348.title: Способ получения коллоидного раствора серебра и коллоидный раствор
009-894-295-889-348.abstract: Изобретение относится к неорганической химии и может быть использовано в биологии и медицине. Сначала дистиллированную воду очищают методом двойного обратного осмоса и помещают в неё электроды, изготовленные из серебра, содержащего не более 10-4масс. % примесей. Между электродами пропускают импульсные электрические разряды. Затем полученный раствор замораживают до полной кристаллизации, выдерживают не менее 150 ч, размораживают до жидкого состояния и измеряют максимальные значения показателей экстинкции К02и К04в полосах поглощения раствора в областях 0,2 мкм и 0,4 мкм. После этого рассчитывают отношение К02к К04. В случае если это отношение меньше 5, повторяют процедуру замораживания-размораживания раствора до тех пор, пока отношение К02к К04не превысит 5. Процесс можно проводить в вакуумированном реакторе при давлении не более половины давления насыщенных паров воды. Полученный коллоидный раствор содержит дистиллированную воду в качестве диспергирующей среды, в которой не более 10-3масс. % газообразных и жидких примесей и не более 10-4масс. % твердых компонентов, и частицы серебра, размер которых преимущественно не превышает 5 нм при низкой концентрации частиц серебра с размером 10-50 нм. 2 н. и 1 з.п. ф-лы.

002-271-954-887-771.title: Catalytic ceramic membrane reaction device
002-271-954-887-771.abstract: The utility model relates to a catalytic ceramic membrane reaction device. The device mainly comprises a gas supplying device, an ignition device and a catalytic ceramic membrane pipe, wherein high-temperature dust-containing gas enters the device in a cyclone manner from a gas inlet along a tangential direction of the reaction device, and is mixed with oxygen, air and water steam which are supplied by the gas supplying device, or a mixture thereof; the mixed gas is subjected to an oxidization or reduction reaction by electric spark ignition, and then passes through the catalytic ceramic membrane pipe under a high-temperature condition; dust in the gas is filtered by the surface; and the gas is subjected to a catalytic reaction in a process of passing through the catalytic ceramic membrane pipe and is finally discharged by a gas outlet. The catalytic ceramic membrane pipe is a pore-gradient ceramic membrane pipe which can be used for loading different catalysts in different pore diameter ranges, and the bottom of the catalytic ceramic membrane pipe is sealed; and the pore diameter size and the thickness are sequentially increased from outside to inside. The reaction device is simple and feasible and has great treatment amount; and the triple effects including dust removal, catalysis and oxidization reduction can be realized.

009-248-562-693-002.title: 一种安全性能高的智能温控器
009-248-562-693-002.abstract: 本实用新型涉及一种安全性能高的智能温控器，包括壳体，壳体的内部固定连接有控制电板和变压器，变压器位于控制电板的上方，控制电板上固定连接有电流互感器和第一温度感应器，第一温度感应器位于电流互感器的一侧，第一温度感应器远离控制电板的一端贯穿壳体延伸至壳体的外侧，壳体的底部转动连接有防护罩，壳体的外侧且位于防护罩的上方固定连接有LED显示面板。本实用新型的有益效果在于，通过两个散热风扇运行和散热孔从而可以更好对壳体内部进行散热，避免该智能温控器高温运行引起电路老化等问题，影响该智能温控器的安全性能；通过防护罩可以防止插头长时间裸漏在潮湿空气中，水汽进入壳体内部附着在带电导体表面造成打火、短路等故障。

016-089-751-725-307.title: Apparatus and methods to measure economizer outdoor air fractions and fault detection diagnostics of airflow, cooling capacity, and heating capacity
016-089-751-725-307.abstract: An apparatus and method for measuring or controlling the Outdoor Air Fraction (OAF) ratio through economizer or outdoor air dampers and cabinet to total system airflow and mixed-air humidity ratio and wetbulb temperature for HVAC equipment. An OAF exceeding the minimum regulatory requirements wastes energy and contributes to global warming. OAF is used to optimize economizer damper position either manually or automatically using an economizer Fault Detection Diagnostic controller and actuator to meet minimum outdoor airflow requirements. After the outdoor air damper position is optimized, the mixed-air humidity ratio and mixed-air wetbulb temperature are determined and used with the measured mixed-air drybulb and supply-air drybulb temperatures to evaluate evaporator airflow, cooling capacity, and heating capacity, and, if necessary, provide a visual or electronically-transmitted error code signal indicating maintenance requirements to check or correct economizer damper position, cabinet leakage, airflow, cooling or heating capacity, and/or other faults for the HVAC system.

014-590-197-651-924.title: WATER PRODUCING METHOD AND APPARATUS
014-590-197-651-924.abstract: A water producing system adapted to condense water from the air and collected in a storage tank were the water is purified and bacteria is killed. One form of killing the bacteria is utilizing an ozone injection system with a filter system to remove the ozone before the water is dispensed. In one form, a dual fluid circuit is utilized where an operating fluid dumps heat to a second circuit such as a refrigeration cycle and the cooled operating fluid lowers the temperature of a water condensation member.

035-876-801-683-750.title: Burner and combustion method for the production of flame jet sheets in industrial furnaces
035-876-801-683-750.abstract: This invention relates to a burner and a method of combustion for producing a flame jet sheet or sheets for various applications in industrial furnaces. The burner has at least one linear or curvilinear flame nozzle having a ratio of width to height of greater than unity in order to produce high velocity and high temperature flame jet sheet or sheets with a well defined geometry. The burner is capable of being scaled to various sizes for various industrial furnace applications due to its geometry.

018-232-285-110-795.title: REFRIGERATOR
018-232-285-110-795.abstract: 【課題】真ん中野菜室タイプの冷蔵庫であっても野菜室にオゾンやＯＨラジカルを含むナノレベルのミストを供給でき、しかも信頼性が高い冷蔵庫の提供。【解決手段】霧化装置３４の印加電極３５をペェルチェ素子３７で冷却する構成とし、かつ、前記霧化装置３４の制御部４８はペェルチェ素子３７に通電して印加電極３５を冷却した後に当該印加電極へ高電圧を印加する構成としてある。これにより、霧化装置の印加電極は野菜室の上方の貯蔵室が冷凍室等の冷凍温温度帯の貯蔵室でなくでも周りの水蒸気を結露させ、ＯＨラジカル等を含むナノレベルのミストを放出させることができる。しかも、この霧化装置は印加電圧が放電する際には当該印加電極に結露水が付着していて空放電するようなことがないので、空放電による印加電極の摩滅を抑制してその寿命を長くすることができる。【選択図】図１６

050-861-685-605-406.title: 一种闪火电压提升剂的制备系统
050-861-685-605-406.abstract: 本实用新型提出了一种闪火电压提升剂的制备系统，包括反应釜、蒸馏塔、一级冷凝装置、二级冷凝装置、三级冷凝装置、一级储罐及二级储罐，反应釜上设置有进液口及出液口，蒸馏塔设置在反应釜的顶部，一级冷凝装置的进口及出口分别与蒸馏塔的出口及一级储罐相连，一级储罐与二级储罐之间通过二级冷凝装置相连接，三级冷凝装置的一端连接二级储罐，另一端连接真空泵，一级储罐及二级储罐还分别连接废水处理系统。本实用新型可以逐级通过冷凝的方式将负压蒸馏过程中水蒸气中的乙二醇冷凝成液态形式并分别存储在一级储罐和二级储罐中，通过废水处理系统可以对乙二醇及水的混合溶液进行集中处理，避免在蒸馏过程中乙二醇通过真空系统抽吸到空气中污染环境。

057-801-763-994-129.abstract: A hydrogen extraction unit (10) has reformed gas flow channel plates (30), hydrogen separation plates (40), and purge gas flow channel plates (50), which are designed as thin metal plate members. The hydrogen extraction unit (10) is constructed by laminating these thin plate members and then bonding them together by diffusion bonding. 052-019-347-068-407.title: Coated leather
052-019-347-068-407.abstract: A coated leather, in particular split cowhide leather, has a preferably nubuck-like appearing surface structure. The coating is formed with a surface layer formed with a mechanically and moisture-stable polymer and bonded to the surface of the leather or split leather by a polymer-based bonding layer. The outer layer is notable for inner smoothness and is formed with soft polyurethane. It includes in the non-embossed region microdepressions which are essentially closed in the direction of the leather but are open towards the outside, have an internal width of less than 130 mum and are arranged close-packed to each other in the manner of soapy foam cells. The microdepressions are each separately bounded by thin mutually crosslinked stays which have on the outside a matt or finely fibrous fine-roughness structure surface, and have an essentially semispherical-shaped concave inner surface which faces outward and is smooth. The coating may include two or more layers that are riveted to each other by way of pins or the like that are anchored in pores.

064-489-247-415-477.abstract: This invention relates to a burner and a method of combustion for producing a flame jet sheet or sheets for various applications in industrial furnaces. The burner has at least one linear or curvilinear flame nozzle having a ratio of width to height of greater than unity in order to produce high velocity and high temperature flame jet sheet or sheets with a well defined geometry. The burner is capable of being scaled to various sizes for various industrial furnace applications due to its geometry.

095-655-395-383-88X.title: Apparatus and process for mediated electrochemical oxidation of materials
095-655-395-383-88X.abstract: A unique apparatus unique apparatus and process that uses mediated electrochemical oxidation (MEO) for: (1) Destruction of: a) nearly all organic solid, liquid, and gases materials, except fluorinated hydrocarbons; b) all biological solid, liquid, and gases materials; c) and/or dissolution and decontamination (such as cleaning equipment and containers, etc.) of nearly all inorganic solid, liquid, or gas where higher oxidation states exist which includes, but is not limited to, halogenated inorganic compounds (except fluorinated), inorganic pesticides and herbicides, inorganic fertilizers, carbon residues, inorganic carbon compounds, mineral formations, mining tailings, inorganic salts, metals and metal compounds, etc.); and d) combined materials (e.g. a mixture of any of the foregoing with each other); henceforth collectively referred to as materials. (2) Sterilization/disinfection of equipment, glassware, etc., by destroying all existing infectious materials. (3) Dissolution of transuranic/actinide materials and/or destruction of the oxidizable components in the hazardous waste portion of mixed waste. (4) Generation of hydrogen and oxygen from MEO of materials. (5) Alteration of organic, biological, and inorganic materials by MEO to produce other compounds from these materials. The materials are introduced into an apparatus for contacting the materials with an electrolyte containing the oxidized form of one or more reversible redox couples, at least one of which is produced electrochemically by anodic oxidation at the anode of an electrochemical cell. The oxidized forms of any other redox couples present are produced either by similar anodic oxidation or reaction with the oxidized form of other redox couples present and capable of affecting the required redox reaction. The oxidized species of the redox couples oxidize the materials molecules and are themselves converted to their reduced form, whereupon they are reoxidized by either of the aforementioned mechanisms and the redox cycle continues until all oxidizable material species, including intermediate reaction products, have undergone the desired degree of oxidation. The entire process takes place at temperatures between ambient and approximately 100° C. The oxidation process may be enhanced by the addition of reaction enhancements, such as: ultrasonic energy and/or ultraviolet radiation.

060-203-431-685-926.title: Method and devices for producing hydrogen by plasma reformer
060-203-431-685-926.abstract: One of these devices comprises: a reaction with cold plasma (10b), for producing the reforming of a primary mixture consisting of fuel gas (hydrocarbon or alcohol), as well as oxygen and/or water vapor, thus producing a secondary mixture containing in particular hydrogen, carbon dioxide and carbon monoxide; an intake piece (18) for mixing these constituents, co-operating with a burner (42) and an associated combustion chamber (40) to bring the resulting primary mixture to a high temperature, before it is introduced into the reaction chamber (10a); a ring-shaped chimney (48) enclosing this chamber for maintaining it at a relatively high temperature; a high frequency alternating high voltage source (58), modulated by brief periodical low frequency pulses and electrodes (62-66) for generating silent discharges, in the reaction chamber (10b) thus generating a cold plasma producing a high chemical reactivity to the gas mixture present; a membrane (12) with high selective permeability for extracting the nascent hydrogen, arranged between the chamber (10b) and a chamber for collecting the hydrogen (14); a thermal insulating sheath (50) enclosing the whole set. The invention is applicable to PEM type fuel cells, fitted on electric vehicles or on portable generator set.

110-662-069-237-825.title: FUEL STEAM REFORMER SYSTEM AND REFORMER STARTUP PROCESS
110-662-069-237-825.abstract: A hydrogen generation system is disclosed that has a vaporization section receiving and vaporizing fuel along with water and passing the vapor to a reformer catalyst section heated by a combustor section which generates reformate gas and is fueled by off-gas from a H<SUB>2 </SUB>purification unit along with a combustion air source. The off-gas outlet feeds the combustor section in the reformer assembly to heat the catalyst section and the vaporization section. An H<SUB>2 </SUB>storage unit connected to the H<SUB>2 </SUB>purification unit pure H<SUB>2 </SUB>outlet receives the pure H<SUB>2</SUB>. The storage unit has an outlet selectively connectable to the reformer assembly process inlet during startup without the need for a spark igniter. The startup process includes generating heat in the combustor section of the reformer assembly by passing H<SUB>2 </SUB>from the H<SUB>2 </SUB>storage unit through the vaporization section, the reformer catalyst section, the H<SUB>2 </SUB>purification unit and through the off-gas connection to the combustor section, then introducing water and fuel through the vaporization section and reformer catalyst section to generate reformate gas when the system is warmed, passing the reformate gas through the H<SUB>2 </SUB>purification unit to the off-gas connection to the combustor section, and establishing a back pressure on the reformer catalyst section and vaporizer section to decrease the hydrogen flow from the H<SUB>2 </SUB>storage unit until the system is fully sustainable without addition of H<SUB>2 </SUB>from the H<SUB>2 </SUB>storage unit.

112-052-701-546-66X.title: WASTE HEAT UTILIZATION SYSTEM INCLUDING WATERY MATERIAL DRYER
112-052-701-546-66X.abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To solve the problem in which: a dryer exhausts a high-temperature gas when drying a watery material such as sludge, and releases the gas even though the gas can contain a larger amount of water, and therefore, the dryer is desired to be improved so as to utilize the exhaust gas as renewable energy; and if the gas exhausted from the dryer when the watery material such as sludge is dried contains a large amount of water, installation of a fire spark prevention device can be omitted, and thereby the number of materials and the size of the entire system can be expected to be reduced at a low cost.SOLUTION: A waste heat utilization system includes a watery material dryer 20 that dries a watery material 22 input from an input port 21 and discharges the dried product 24 from a discharge port 23 to be taken out, and obtains a drying heat source from a combustion furnace 11 through a suction blower 14 and releases a gas containing water vapor into the atmosphere from a chimney 13 through a dryer cyclone 15. A first junction 40 is provided between the dryer cyclone 15 and the chimney 13, and is connected by pipe with a second junction 42 provided between the combustion furnace cyclone 12 and the suction blower 14 through a control valve 31.

110-597-967-624-95X.title: Compressor and heating and ventilation equipment
110-597-967-624-95X.abstract: The utility model discloses a compressor and heating and ventilation equipment, the compressor comprises a shell, a terminal cover, a terminal, a shell connecting wire group and a sealing element, the terminal cover is installed on the shell, an installation space is formed between the terminal cover and the shell, and the terminal cover is provided with a terminal wire outlet; one end of the connecting wire group is electrically connected with the terminal, and the other end of the connecting wire group penetrates through the terminal wire outlet and extends out of the terminal cover; the sealing element seals an assembling gap between the terminal wire outlet and the connecting wire set, a first limiting part is arranged on the sealing element, a second limiting part is arranged on the shell and/or the terminal cover, and the first limiting part and the second limiting part are matched to limit the position of the sealing element. According to the compressor disclosed by the embodiment of the utility model, the sealing element is arranged between the shell and the terminal cover, so that refrigerants or impurities in external environments such as water, water vapor and oxygen are prevented from entering the mounting space, and the probability of series faults such as short circuit, corrosion, poor contact or sparking of the compressor is reduced; and the safety and the reliability of the compressor during working are improved.

101-904-446-492-649.abstract: The present invention relates to single walled and multi-­walled carbon nanotubes (CNTs), functionalized CNTs and carbon nanotube composites with controlled properties, to a method for aerosol synthesis of single walled and multi-walled carbon nanotubes, functionalized CNTs and carbon nanotube composites with controlled properties from pre-made catalyst particles and a carbon source in the presence of reagents and additives, to functional, matrix and composite materials composed thereof and structures and devices fabricated from the same in continuous or batch CNT reactors. The present invention allows all or part of the processes of synthesis of CNTs, their purification, doping, functionalization, coating, mixing and deposition to be combined in one continuous procedure and in which the catalyst synthesis, the CNT synthesis, and their functionalization, doping, coating, mixing and deposition can be separately controlled.

113-186-788-193-907.title: Water mist fire-retardant spraying tank for waste gas treatment in printing and dyeing mill
113-186-788-193-907.abstract: The invention discloses a water mist fire-retardant spray tank for waste gas treatment in a printing and dyeing mill, which comprises a tank body and two support frames fixedly arranged on the lower wall of the tank body, one end of the tank body is communicated with a gas inlet pipe, the other end of the tank body is communicated with a gas outlet pipe, a fire damper is arranged at the gas outlet pipe, an access door is arranged on the side wall of the tank body, and the access door is communicated with the gas inlet pipe. A water spraying pipe and a first through pipe are arranged on the upper wall of the tank body in a penetrating mode, and a plurality of water outlet holes are evenly formed in the side wall of the water spraying pipe. The invention relates to the technical field of spraying tanks. According to the water mist fire-retardant spraying tank for waste gas treatment of the printing and dyeing mill, the situation of fire caused by electrostatic spark ignition is prevented, safety accidents caused by electrostatic fire are fully prevented in cooperation with water vapor with sufficient volume fraction in the tank body, and the spraying tank can purify and absorb acid-base gas contained in waste gas, so that the waste gas treatment effect is improved, and the service life of the spraying tank is prolonged. And environmental pollution caused by the fact that the air is discharged into the air is prevented.

112-480-697-115-963.title: REFRIGERATOR
112-480-697-115-963.abstract: To provide a refrigerator which can supply nano-level mist containing ozone and OH radicals to a vegetable chamber, even for a refrigerator in which the vegetable chamber is in the middle, and which has high reliability.SOLUTION: A refrigerator is configured in such a manner that an application electrode 35 of an atomizer 34 is cooled by a Peltier device 37, and a control unit 48 of the atomizer 34 conducts electricity to the Peltier device 37 and cools the application electrode 35, and then it applies a high voltage to the application electrode. Thereby, even when a storage chamber above a vegetable chamber is not a storage chamber of a freezing temperature zone such as a freezing chamber and the like, the application electrode of the atomizer can allow surrounding water vapor to condense and can discharge nano-level mist containing OH radicals and the like. Furthermore, in this atomizer, when the application electrode performs electric discharge, dew condensation water is attached to the application electrode and empty discharge is not performed, so that wear of the application electrode due to empty discharge is suppressed and the service life can be prolonged.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 16

126-745-173-649-875.title: Apparatus and methods for creating sparkling water from the atmosphere
126-745-173-649-875.abstract: What is disclosed is a system designed to extract water moisture from the atmosphere, highly purify and condition the extracted water, and provide optional carbonation of the extracted water for human consumption. In one embodiment, the device collects water-vapor condensation from filtered intake air, then subjects the condensate to a series of purification filters and to a sterilization process in order to produce drinking water, while also providing a means to combine the purified water with CO2 gas to facilitate dispensing carbonated water and/or carbonated drinks.

121-086-023-628-675.title: Residential flame broiler
121-086-023-628-675.abstract: The invention discloses a gas grill with multiple enhancements to allow for easy grilling of foods, subsequent clean-up, and replacement of parts. In lieu of a top-opening lid, the apparatus provides a plurality of removable and insertable drawers, comprising a plurality of burner units, a plurality of grill trays, and a drip tray located in a vertical configuration therein a base unit. All drawers are interchangeable as desired. A storage compartment is located on the bottom directly below the drip tray and an exhaust assembly is located on the top for directing smoke away from the apparatus. The invention is adaptable to propane or natural gas. Additional drawers and burner assemblies are provided and may be used for charcoal or wood burning, bun or food warming, and water steaming. All drawers are easily removable on slides with a safety catch system for easy care and cleaning.

147-701-025-862-217.title: Water producing method and apparatus
147-701-025-862-217.abstract: A water producing system adapted to condense water from the air and collected in a storage tank were the water is purified and bacteria is killed. One form of killing the bacteria is utilizing an ozone injection system with a filter system to remove the ozone before the water is dispensed. In one form, a dual fluid circuit is utilized where an operating fluid dumps heat to a second circuit such as a refrigeration cycle and the cooled operating fluid lowers the temperature of a water condensation member.

156-061-074-960-570.title: ALUMINUM COMPOSITE MATERIAL EXCELLENT IN CORROSION RESISTANCE AND ITS PRODUCTION
156-061-074-960-570.abstract: PURPOSE:To form an Al-O-N-type layer excellent in wear resistance, water resistance, and corrosion resistance on the surface of an Al member by placing an Al or Al-alloy member into a hermetically sealed vessel, removing residual gas in the above vessel, heating the Al member, activating the surface, introducing an oxygen-containing nitrogen gas, and then carrying out glow discharge. CONSTITUTION:A member 3 made of Al or Al alloy is placed on a base 2 in a hermetically sealed vessel 1, and then, the pressure in the vessel 1 is reduced by means of a vacuum pump 8, e.g., to 10<-3>Torr and heating is applied by means of heaters 10, by which water vapor and residual gas are completely excluded. Subsequently, H2 gas is introduced as a gas for temperature rise, and DC discharge is initiated between an anode 12 made of stainless steel and the base 2 as a cathode to raise the temperature of the Al member 3 up to about 500 deg.C. Then, Ar is introduced as a gas for activation and the surface of the Al member 3 is activated by means of electric discharge, and an N2 gas containing 0.2-100ppm O2 is introduced to carry out glow discharge in the hermetically sealed vessel 1, by which the surface of the Al member 3 is subjected to nitriding treatment at 300-550 deg.C. By this method, the aluminum oxynitride layer containing 1-20wt.% O2 and excellent in corrosion resistance, etc., can be formed to 1-50mum thickness.

153-264-532-954-065.title: 一种减少火花产生的空调电控盒
153-264-532-954-065.abstract: 本实用新型涉及空调电控盒技术领域，且公开了一种减少火花产生的空调电控盒，包括电控盒，所述电控盒的顶部设置有盒盖，所述电控盒的后侧内壁固定安装有间隔部件；向下按压滑动板和隔板的装配体，直至入线孔前侧开口处的电线穿过异形槽的避让槽，卡在半环形橡胶板的内部，同时半环形橡胶板和电线配合使用对入线孔进行遮挡，从而达到将入线口进行密封的目的，另外，隔板底部的橡胶条抵接在电路板的顶部，将电线位于电路板上的两个焊接点隔开，起到隔开引入的电线在电路板上的焊点的作用，防止电火花的产生，再通过盒盖和垫板的装配体盖在盒体的顶部，将盒体进行密封，防止水汽等异物进入盒体内，保持盒体内的干燥，降低电火花产生的可能性。

158-006-173-137-804.title: Electrostatic dust collector driving method, driving circuit and controller thereof
158-006-173-137-804.abstract: The invention discloses an electrostatic dust collector driving method, a driving circuit and a controller thereof, and the method comprises the following steps: a main control unit sets an intermittent starting signal according to a preset frequency and a preset pulse width, enables an oscillation unit to generate a driving signal according to the intermittent starting signal, and enables a current and voltage sampling unit to carry out sampling detection on the driving signal; the main control unit obtains a sampling detection result fed back by the current and voltage sampling unit, and if the sampling detection result is abnormal, the main control unit outputs a shutdown signal; when the water vapor content in the environment is high, the main control unit sends an intermittent starting signal to the oscillation unit, so that the oscillation unit generates high-voltage pulse corona discharge with a steep leading edge and a narrow pulse width, the electric field quickly enters a working state, and then the electric field unit obtains non-equilibrium plasma at normal temperature in a manner of intermittently generating high voltage; the defect that spark discharge occurs when pure high-voltage static electricity encounters water mist and operation is unstable is overcome, the electrostatic dust collector operates more stably, and energy consumption is reduced.

192-315-121-736-25X.title: Improvements in or relating to combined lighting, heating and ventilating systems
192-315-121-736-25X.abstract: 546,005. Air conditioning apparatus; lamps combined with ventilating apparatus. CAMPBELL, H. G., SKINNER, G. D., and BENJAMIN ELECTRIC, Ltd. March 13, 1941, No. 3408. [Class 137] [Also in Group XI] In a combined lighting and air conditioning device the lighting is effected by electric discharge lamps which are controlled by an inductance, resistance or capacitance constituting or forming part of a device for conditioning or circulating the air. The air is conditioned by heating, cooling, ozonizing or sterilizing, and for heating an electric, water, steam or gas radiator may be employed. For sterilizing, use is made of ultraviolet rays from the lamps. In Fig. 2, the lighting unit comprises three tubular gas discharge lamps 1, 2, 3 disposed below a reflector 4 above which is a casing 5 through which air is caused to circulate by a fan 10 from inlets in the upper wall through lowered outlets 6. Heaters 7 are disposed behind the louvres, and below deflector plates 8 is an ozone generator 9 energized by a transformer 91, the whole fitting being suspended from the ceiling by rods 12. The motor 11 driving the fan is a three-phase motor whose windings are used as lamp ballasts. Part of the air from the fan is heated and passes through the louvres, and part passes over the ozonizer and through openings in the lower part of the casing 5, providing a screen of relatively cool air between the lamps and the heated air above, so that the lamps are prevented from overheating. In Fig. 4, the device is built into a ceiling a, and a portion 14 of glass or other transparent material which may have a fluorescent coating is disposed below a casing 13 in which a fan 18 draws in air through louvres 15 and delivers it past a heater 17 to outlet louvres 15. The vapour discharge lamps 20 provide ultra-violet rays which sterilize a part of the air current.

165-677-180-647-168.title: Compressor and heating and ventilation equipment
165-677-180-647-168.abstract: The utility model discloses a compressor and heating and ventilation equipment, the compressor comprises a shell, a terminal cover, a terminal, a sealing element and a connecting wire group, the terminal cover is installed on the shell, and an installation space is formed between the terminal cover and the shell; a part of the terminals extend into the shell, and a part of the terminals extend into the mounting space; the sealing element is sealed between the shell and the terminal cover, the sealing element is provided with a wire passing channel, and the wire passing channel is communicated with the mounting space; and one end of the connecting wire group is electrically connected with the terminal, and the other end is suitable for penetrating through the wire passing channel to extend out of the mounting space so as to be electrically connected with an external circuit. According to the compressor disclosed by the embodiment of the utility model, the sealing element is used for sealing the gaps between the connecting wire group and the terminal cover and between the connecting wire group and the shell, so that refrigerants or impurities in external environments such as water, water vapor, oxygen and the like are prevented from entering the mounting space, and the probability of series faults such as short circuit, corrosion, poor contact or sparking of the compressor is reduced; and the safety and the reliability of the compressor during working are improved.

192-876-582-592-391.title: 臭氧发生管
192-876-582-592-391.abstract: 一种臭氧发生管，包括：外电极体、内电极体、介电体、第一固定盘、绝缘管及引流组件；外电极体设有开口；内电极体容置于外电极体中；介电体处于外电极体与内电极体之间，介电体与外电极体之间留有放电间隙；第一固定盘用于与外电极体的开口抵接，使外电极体内部形成密封环境；绝缘管贯穿第一固定盘；绝缘管外侧与第一固定盘一体化连接；引流组件从绝缘管穿入至外电极体内，并向内电极体输入电压。臭氧发生管的组合装配过程中，绝缘管与第一固定盘一体化连接，能消除绝缘管与第一固定盘之间的缝隙，有效提高臭氧发生管的密封性及装配效率；阻止水气、灰尘或其它杂质会进入到放电间隙内，避免了在放电间隙发生高压打火问题。

161-753-775-343-135.title: Hydrogen extraction unit
161-753-775-343-135.abstract: A hydrogen extraction unit has reformed gas flow channel plates, hydrogen separation plates, and purge gas flow channel plates, which are designed as thin metal plate members. The hydrogen extraction unit is constructed by laminating these thin plate members and then bonding them together by diffusion bonding. Each of reformed gas flow channel holes formed in the reformed gas flow channel plates constitutes a flow channel for reformed gas together with a correspondingly adjacent one of the hydrogen separation plates. Each of purge gas flow channel holes formed in the purge gas flow channel plates constitutes, together with a correspondingly adjacent one of the hydrogen separation plates, a flow channel for purge gas with which hydrogen extracted from reformed gas is mixed.

058-543-505-489-119.title: METHOD AND DEVICE TO PRODUCE ACETYLENE
058-543-505-489-119.abstract: FIELD: chemistry. ^ SUBSTANCE: invention relates to production of acetylene by plasma chemical pyrolysis of minced solid raw stock with grain size of smaller than 100 mcm by steam in impulse electric discharge plasma generator. Proposed method consists in using shock wave and differs from known methods in that electric discharge in plasma generator is effected in interval smaller than 1 ms while gas product rate is reduced in tubular heat exchange arranged downstream of Laval nozzle. Invention relates also to device intended for implementation of above described method. ^ EFFECT: high yield of acetylene, power savings. ^ 6 cl, 1 ex, 2 dwg

150-380-435-433-574.title: METHOD FOR STEAM-PLASMA GASIFICATION OF COAL
150-380-435-433-574.abstract:
1. A coal gasification method, comprising generating a plasma jet, feeding pulverized coal and superheated water steam into the volume of a reaction chamber, removing the resulting synthesis gas and slag from said reaction chamber, characterized in that the plasma jet is generated by an electric arc discharge between two molten metal electrodes located in the volume of the reaction chamber, between which there is an arcuate cooled channel through which said arc discharge passes, and superheated water steam is fed into said arcuate channel between said electrodes, thereby forming a vortex flow thereof.
2. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that the fraction size of the pulverized coal is no more than 5 mm.
3. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that slag is removed from the surface of the electrodes.

012-493-317-463-323.abstract: FIELD: process engineering.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to food industry and bioenergetics. Note here that plasma treatment is carried out at pressure below barometric pressure while oxidiser and pelletised catalyst are additionally introduced in electric discharge area. 162-333-176-400-156.abstract: FIELD: textile industry, in particular, processing of wool and fibrous materials, such as card slivers or fabrics. 164-769-803-668-515.title: METHOD FOR DETERMINING THE ISOTOPIC COMPOSITION OF METHANE
164-769-803-668-515.abstract:
1. A method for determining the isotopic composition of methane, comprising supplying a sample for analysis, conversion of methane into an analyte in air or a gas containing oxygen, supplying the analyte for analysis, ionization of the analyte, isotopic analysis of the analyte ions by means of a mass analyzer, and calculation of the isotopic composition of methane, characterized in that the analyte is methanol, and the conversion is carried out by means of an electric discharge in a gas.

2. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that the ionization of the analyte is performed by means of atmospheric pressure chemical ionization.

3. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that supplying the analyte for analysis includes an analyte enrichment procedure.

4. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that water vapor is added to the gas during the conversion of methane into the analyte.

5. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that the conversion of methane into the analyte and the ionization of the analyte are carried out simultaneously by means of a corona electric discharge in a gas at atmospheric pressure.

6. The method according to claim 1, characterized in that the isotopic composition of a methyl fragment of the methane molecule is calculated.

174-525-835-748-589.title: Reactor and process for producing hydrogen
174-525-835-748-589.abstract: Изобретение относится к области химической промышленности, а именно к получению водорода, и может быть использовано в водородной энергетике.Реактор для получения водорода содержит корпус (1) из немагнитного материала, например, нержавеющей стали или меди, с рубашкой охлаждения (2), расположенный в расточке статора (10) электродвигателя. Корпус (1) снабжен снизу патрубком (6) впуска водяного пара от нагревателя воды (5) и патрубком (16) отвода продуктов реакции и конденсата, и сверху патрубком (17) подачи частиц (9) алюминия и патрубком (7) отвода водорода. Внутри корпуса закреплены неподвижные электроды (3), подключенные к источнику питания (4) постоянного тока, и расположены подвижные частицы (8) из магнитомягкого материала, выполненные в форме проволоки с длиной в 1,5…3 раза меньшей расстояния между неподвижными электродами (3) и с отношением длины к диаметру равным 12…14, а объем подвижных частиц (8) составляет 1…3% от объема корпуса (1) реактора.Способ получения водорода состоит в том, что формируют вращающееся магнитное поле 25…32 мТл в корпусе (1) реактора с его охлаждением, подают постоянно в промежуток между неподвижными электродами (3), подключенными к источнику питания (4) с напряжением 40…90 В, частицы (9) алюминия размерами 102…106 нм и водяной пар, осуществляют электрические разряды между подвижными частицами (8) и электродами (3), и отводят водород из корпуса (1) реактора.

122-270-463-325-949.title: METHOD FOR PRODUCING THERMAL AND ELECTRICAL ENERGY AND DEVICE FOR IMPLEMENTING SAID METHOD
122-270-463-325-949.abstract: The invention relates to electrical power engineering and can be used for the production of autonomous sources of thermal and electrical energy. The required technical result, which consists in increasing the effectiveness of the generation of thermal energy whilst at the same time producing electrical energy, is achieved in a method based on the generation of a high-voltage electrical discharge between an anode electrode and a cathode electrode which are mounted in series, said electrical discharge being formed from a hydride-forming metal, and forming a vortex flow of inert gas along the axis between the anode electrode and the cathode electrode in the direction of the cathode electrode with hot steam being injected into this flow, wherein the high-voltage electric discharge between the anode electrode and the cathode electrode is generated by means of the supply of a combined voltage to said electrodes, said combined voltage comprising a DC component and a radiofrequency component, the cathode electrode is in the form of a nozzle with an opening for the discharge of hot steam, and at least one pair of electrode probes for drawing electrical energy is mounted between the electrodes, one of said electrode probes being arranged on the axis of the vortex flow, and the other being arranged at the periphery thereof. The device for implementing the method comprises: a quartz tube in which an electrode anode and an electrode cathode are mounted in series on one axis, with an electrical energy generator being connected to said electrode anode and said electrode cathode, wherein the electrode cathode is formed from a hydride-forming metal; a generator of a vortex flow of inert gas, which is mounted at the inlet end of the quartz tube and is capable of generating a vortex flow of inert gas along the axis between the anode electrode and the cathode electrode in the direction of the cathode electrode; and also at least one pair of electrode probes, which are capable of drawing electrical energy, one of which electrode probes is arranged on the axis between the anode electrode and the cathode electrode, and the other of which is arranged at the periphery of the vortex flow, wherein the electrode anode is in the form of a steam injector, the electrode cathode is in the form of a nozzle with an opening for discharging hot vapour, and an electrical energy generator, which is connected to the electrode anode and the electrode cathode, is capable of generating a combined voltage comprising a DC component and a radiofrequency component.

071-872-329-303-984.title: WATER AS ADDITIONAL FUEL
071-872-329-303-984.abstract: The invention relates to a method for obtaining hydrogen as an additional fuel, as well as for optimizing the process of combustion of a classic gaseous, liquid, solid fuel, biogas included. According to the invention, the method consists of the reversible reaction of catalytic decomposition and recombination of water into and from its components, leading to hydrogen generation and subsequent combustion in the presence of oxygen, the reaction being initiated and maintained by a spark or a flame produced during fuel combustion, where the temperature required for water decomposition is reached in the fuel combustion process which is not carried out under adiabatic conditions, by bringing the air needed for combustion in a saturation state with water vapour and/or wetting the fuel in a ratio that should not affect the water catalytic decomposition temperature, known per se.

029-215-719-106-078.title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PRODUCING ACETYLENE
029-215-719-106-078.abstract:
1. A method for producing acetylene by plasma-chemical pyrolysis of a mixture of pulverized solid feedstock with water vapor in a pulsed electric-discharge plasmatron, characterized in that the process is carried out using a shock wave, and the velocity of the resulting gas product is reduced in a tubular heat exchanger.

2. The method for producing acetylene according to claim 1, characterized in that the electric discharge in the pulsed plasmatron is produced in a time of less than 1 ms.

3. The method for producing acetylene according to claim 1, characterized in that the tubular heat exchanger is water-cooled.

4. A device for producing acetylene, comprising a reactor, means for introducing reactants, electrodes with a high-voltage capacitive power supply and a Laval nozzle, characterized in that the device is equipped with a tubular heat exchanger, and a sampler is installed between the Laval nozzle and the tubular heat exchanger.

5. The device for producing acetylene, characterized in that the tubular heat exchanger is water-cooled.

011-225-769-774-424.title: Способ получения тепловой и электрической энергии и устройство для его реализации
011-225-769-774-424.abstract: Изобретение относится к электроэнергетике и водородной энергетике и может быть использовано в источниках тепловой и электрической энергии. В способе предусмотрено формирование высоковольтного импульсно-периодического электрического разряда между установленными последовательно электродами: анодным (3) электродом, пассивными (6) электродами - обострителями электрического поля и катодным (7) электродом, выполненным из гидридо-образующего металла, формирование вихревого потока водяного пара (2, 7) вдоль оси между электродами, наличие теплообменника (8), наличие газгольдера-сепаратора (9, 10) для разделения и хранения водорода. Устройство содержит керамическую трубу (1), электродный анод (3), пассивные электроды (6) и катод (7), выполненный из гидридо-образующего металла, формирователь вихревого потока водяного пара (2, 7), а также водяной теплообменник-затвор (8) и сепаратор-газгольдер (9, 10) для хранения водорода. Конический электродный анод (3) выполнен из тугоплавкого материала (например, из вольфрама или молибдена). Электродный катод выполнен в виде сопла (7) с отверстием для выпуска горячего пара и водорода. Пассивные электроды - обострители (6) выполнены в виде охлаждаемых оживальных тел из тугоплавкого материала (например, вольфрам). Генератор электрической энергии (4, 5) выполнен с возможностью формирования комбинированного напряжения, включающего силовые импульсы тока и высоковольтные поджигающие импульсы. Технический результат - повышение интенсивности процесса одновременной генерации тепловой энергии и наработки дешевого водорода. 2 н.п. ф-лы, 1 ил.

052-907-869-602-297.title: METHOD OF PLASMA CHEMICAL TREATMENT OF LIQUID RAW MATERIAL OF ORGANIC AND/OR VEGETABLE ORIGIN AND DEVICE FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION
052-907-869-602-297.abstract: FIELD: technological processes.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to a method for plasma chemical treatment of liquid raw materials, as well as to a device for such treatment and can be used in food, bioenergy, chemical and petrochemical industries. Method includes an electrical effect on water-containing raw materials of products of low-temperature plasma. Electrical effect is performed with a parameter value E/N=10–10[V·cm], where E is the electric field strength, Nis the concentration of charged particles in the discharge gap. At the same time, the gas medium is moistened, providing a moisture content of 20 to 100 %. Hydrogen index of a raw material is maintained at a level from 2 to 7, the conductivity of the raw material is maintained in the interval S=10–10Cm. Device for plasma chemical treatment of liquid raw materials contains a plasma-chemical reactor, system for supplying and withdrawing raw materials, gas supply system above the irradiated component, and a power source. Power source provides the formation of an electrical discharge with volumetric electronic and ionic charges in a continuous or pulsed mode. Gas supply system is provided with a device for humidifying the supplied gas with water vapor.EFFECT: effective disinfection of raw materials, which is subject to long-term storage, and improvement of efficiency of electric power utilization.4 cl, 2 dwg

009-879-603-862-847.title: BURNER FOR BURNING GAS AND FUEL OIL
009-879-603-862-847.abstract:
The utility model relates to the field of heat power engineering, in particular to devices for burning gaseous and liquid fuels in boiler furnaces and in kilns. For these purposes, combined gas-oil burners are used, in which gas or fuel oil can be burned separately depending on practical needs.

The objective of the utility model is to reduce the formation and emission of harmful nitrogen oxides into the atmosphere.

The technical result is achieved by lowering the temperature in the flame volume during gas combustion and by locally lowering the temperature in the flame core during fuel oil combustion.

Air is supplied from a forced-draft fan through a common air supply duct for mixture formation with the fuel through tangential registers, in which it is swirled using vanes. The air streams, swirled to various degrees, are supplied through channels for mixing with the fuel. When gas is supplied to the burner, its pressure is an order of magnitude higher than the pressure of the air supplied to the burner. Due to the high velocity of the gas at the exit of the gas supply pipes, primary air is sucked into the gas jet.

The gaseous fuel enters through gas supply pipes to mix with the first and second primary air streams of the channels and ignites after mixing. During the first start-up of the burner, ignition is carried out by an external igniter using a spark or an open flame. During further operation, ignition occurs due to the high temperature of the flame front itself.

Since the diameters of the gas supply pipes vary, the diameters of the gas jets exiting the pipes also vary, and mixture formation and combustion occur more intensively in thin gas jets. The ends of the gas supply pipes are bent toward the periphery, and the primary air supply channels have different lengths, so the swirl degrees of the first and second primary air streams are different. Collectively, these structural aerodynamic techniques ensure an increase in the turbulent flame propagation velocity and an increase in the flame front surface area. Due to the heat released during the combustion of the mixture of primary air and part of the gas, the bulk of the secondary air entering the burner through the outer channel is heated, and further combustion of the bulk of the gas occurs.

When using a nozzle, fuel oil is atomized into fine droplets due to high pressure and the supply of primary air through the channels, which facilitates the advanced ignition of fuel oil droplets and the formation of an initial flame front with the release of heat to warm the rest of the combustible mixture mass.

In accordance with the thermal load of the boiler, a computer program uses electric motors with servo drives to rotate the air-swirling vanes of the tangential registers to optimal set angles for the first and second channels of the primary air streams and the channel for the secondary air.

Longitudinal movement of the gas supply pipe outlets using electric motors with servo drives and the nozzle using an electric motor with a servo drive into the optimal position, at which the maximum degree of flame propagation turbulence corresponding to the given thermal load of the boiler is achieved, is carried out by a computer program in accordance with the performance of the induced draft fan, the forced-draft fan, the calorific value of the fuel, the vacuum in the furnace, the location and geometry of the flame along the height, width, and depth of the furnace, and the flame temperature value.

The bent ends of the gas supply pipes allow for shifting the flame front in a direction transverse to the burner axis using electric motors with servo drives over a greater distance and increasing the degree of flame propagation turbulence—that is, achieving the combustion reaction in the kinetic region, in which the intensity of the combustion reaction is high and molecular mixing of fuel with air occurs.

During gas combustion, if nitrogen oxide emissions at the boiler outlet increase according to gas analyzer measurements, an electrical signal is transmitted to the computerized boiler control unit, and the computer program generates a command to turn on the flue gas recirculation fan. The recirculated gases are supplied to nozzles, and the flame temperature decreases, which reduces the rate of chemical reactions forming nitrogen oxides. During fuel oil combustion, if nitrogen oxide emissions at the boiler outlet increase according to gas analyzer measurements of nitrogen oxide content, a blower is additionally switched on by command of the computer program to supply water steam into the nozzles, and the flame temperature also decreases, which reduces the rate of chemical reactions forming nitrogen oxides.

After the flame temperature is lowered, the supply of recirculation gases and the injection of water steam during combustion...

079-921-799-741-873.title: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR PRODUCING STEAM FROM WATER
079-921-799-741-873.abstract:
1. A method for the rapid production of water steam from water, consisting in supplying water into a steam generator housing, heating it, forming steam, and discharging it to a consumer, characterized in that the heating of water is carried out by creating a low-temperature plasma by igniting an electrical discharge in the water between a tubular central electrode and the steam generator housing, maintaining its combustion, wherein the combustion temperature is set and regulated by moving an insulating sheath along the tubular central electrode, wherein the magnitude of displacement of said sheath is determined by the electrical conductivity of the water, which is measured before it is supplied into the steam generator housing, wherein the heating of water and the formation of steam are carried out in the central tubular electrode, and the displacement of the insulating sheath along said electrode is performed by means of a lead mounted with the possibility of movement along the cover of the steam generator housing.

2.
